Opustite se i uživajte uz zabavni program naše televizije.
Uštedite svoje vreme tako što ćete se odlučiti za kupovinu bez stresa, gužve i žurbe, za kupovinu iz fotelje!
Teleshop moda XXXL, televizijska prodaja odeće u najvećim konfekcijskim brojevima, i izuzetnog izgleda. Kvalitetom, dizajnom i vrlo povoljnim cenama ne ostavljamo nijednog kupca nezadovoljnog.
Uštedite svoje vreme tako što ćete se odlučiti za kupovinu bez stresa, gužve i žurbe, za kupovinu iz fotelje!
TV Shop, onlajn prodavnica i kataloška prodaja: po povoljnim cenama AKSESOARI, korisne sitnice i modni dodaci, koji će upotpuniti Vaš izgled.
Uštedite svoje vreme tako što ćete se odlučiti za kupovinu bez stresa, gužve i žurbe, za kupovinu iz fotelje!
Teleshop moda XXXL, televizijska prodaja odeće u najvećim konfekcijskim brojevima, i izuzetnog izgleda. Kvalitetom, dizajnom i vrlo povoljnim cenama ne ostavljamo nijednog kupca nezadovoljnog.

Teleshop lepota i zdravlje, nudimo širok asortiman proizvoda za zdravo i negovano telo, za tretman lica, za zdravu i bujnu kosu, za lepe i negovane nokte... I ne samo bogatu ponudu kozmetičkih proizvoda, nego i raznovrsne proizvode za zdravlje, sve po povoljnim cenama.

Nakon pobede na 74. Igrama gladi, Katnis Everdin i Pita Melark se sigurno vraćaju kući. Međutim, pobeda znači da se moraju okrenuti i ostaviti svoju porodicu i prijatelje kako bi učestvovali na Turneji pobede po svim pokrajinama. Tokom turneje Katnis oseća pobunu koja tinja, ali Kapitol još uvek održava strogu kontrolu, dok predsednik Snou priprema nove, 75. Igre gladi - takmičenje koje bi moglo promeniti Panem zauvek.

Kviz Štoperica se sastoji iz dve runde, pri čemu se vreme za odgovaranje meri štopericom. U prvoj rundi takmičari odgovaraju na tri pitanja, a za svaki odgovor imaju na raspolaganju po 10 sekundi. Ukoliko tačno odgovore, osvajaju zagarantovanu sumu. U drugoj rundi ih čeka šest pitanja, sa po 20 sekundi za svaki odgovor. U zavisnosti od brzine i tačnosti odgovora koje daju, mogu da osvoje i do 15.000 dinara.

Serijal 48 sati svadba na televiziji B92 je subotom i nedeljom od 22.00, a ova epizoda donosi potpuno neočekivanu priču! Miki je spreman da pođe u Keniju i Ugandu, baš kao Josip Broz Tito, davne 1970. godine. Ali pre toga, moraće da ode u Zaječar kako bi iznenadio Dejana i njegovu izabranicu Šeron, koja je zbog ljubavi napustila Najrobi i odlučila da živi u Srbiji. Međutim, da bi Dejan dobio blagoslov Šeroninog oca za brak, u obavezi je da omogući organizaciju tradicionalne kenijske svadbe, koja između ostalog podrazumeva i kupovinu krave i koza. Pogledajte ovu uzbudljivu epizodu i saznajte kako je došlo do toga da se uloge zamene i Dejan postane taj koji je iznenadio Mikija, šta o ovoj emisiji misli Šeronina porodica, a šta o samom paru ima da kaže Dejanov komšiluk.

U zavisnosti od brzine i tačnosti odgovora koje daju, mogu da osvoje i do 15.000 dinara.

Serija Kolo sreće je romantični triler o skomnoj ženi koja se bori sa svim nedaćama koje nosi život samohrane majke dvoje odrasle dece. Rastrzana između želje da obezbedi novac za opstanak svoje porodice i brige o ukućanima, Mara Raketić doživeće obrt kakav se dešava retkima - dobija na lutriji i postaje jedna od najbogatijih osoba u zemlji. Sa Marinim bogatstvom, međutim, krenuće da se raspliću velike tajne i intrige koje ljudi oko nje imaju, ali najveća tajna je ona koju Mara nosi od rane mladosti.

Od ponedeljka, 17. novembra, radni dani u 12:15, subota u 18:00 i nedelja u 13:30 rezervisani su za novu emisiju 7 TV dana, koja svakodnevno, uz drugog voditelja, otvara raznovrsne teme i ekskluzivne priče. Životne priče predstaviće vam Suzana Mančić, o umetnosti i kulturi govoriće voditeljka i glumica Mina Milićević, kroz sport i zabavu vodiće vas Nikola Rađen, a o muzici će pričati Ana Stanić. Ako ste ljubitelj astrologije i misterije, tu je za vas dr Sanja Klisarić. Zanimljve razgovore sa glumcima i pevačima na zabavan način doneće vam Irena Karaklajić i Ivan Milovanović.

Oni nisu obični tinejdžeri, oni su nindža kornjače koje borilačkim veštinama podučava čovekoliki štakor Splinter. Neobični junaci ne mogu bez pice i uvek su spremni da se suprotstave zlikovcima na ulicama Njujorka.

Američka, animirana dečija serija koja prati svakodnevnicu jedanaestogodišnjeg Linkolna u njegovoj, zaista velikoj porodici. Linkoln ima deset sestara i jedini je dečak u porodici, što ukazuje na to koliko je njegov život haotičan. Uživajte u avanturama ove glasne porodice!

U crtanom serijalu čiju radnju nose likovi, uživaćete u nautičkim i često apsurdnim avanturama Sunđera Boba, neizlečivo optimističnog i poštenog morskog sunđera, i njegovih morskih prijatelja. Desetak metara ispod tropskog koralnog ostrva, u podvodnom gradu Koralovu, u dvospratnom ananasu živi Sunđer Bob. Umesto logičnog pristupa svakodnevnim izazovima, Sunđer Bob pristupa životu na uvrnut i nekonvencionalan način. Bez obzira da li je to traženje spatule za usavršavanje tehnike okretanja pljeskavica ili je dangubljenje sa najboljim prijateljem Patrikom (dobroćudnom morskom zvezdom), dobre namere i preterano entuzijastičan karakter Sunđera Boba uglavnom izazivaju haos u njegovom podvodnom svetu.

U crtanom serijalu čiju radnju nose likovi, uživaćete u nautičkim i često apsurdnim avanturama Sunđera Boba, neizlečivo optimističnog i poštenog morskog sunđera, i njegovih morskih prijatelja. Desetak metara ispod tropskog koralnog ostrva, u podvodnom gradu Koralovu, u dvospratnom ananasu živi Sunđer Bob. Ljubitelje sjajne serije Sinđelići obradovaće vest da će se od danas emitovati nove epizode na Prvoj televiziji. Dogodovštine najpoznatije porodice gledaoci će moći da prate radnim danima od 21 sat. Peta sezona obilovaće brojnim, zanimljivim zapletima, preokretima I komičnim situacijama u kojima će se Sreten i Jezda, uz veliku pomoć Fedora naći pred novim izazovima u poslu s kafanom, dok Eva i Metodije postaju roditelji, a novopečena baka Lila odlazi u Francusku kako bi im pomogla oko prinove. Sreten upada u niz zavrzlama u Lilinom odsusustvu u pokušaju da porodicu održi u najboljem mogućem redu, kao da je Lila prisutna. Gojko i Tereza su i dalje zaljubljeni jedno u drugo, kao i Kasija i Rista, ali neprestano upadaju u zabune koje ih uporno razdvajaju. Gojko stiče status jutjub zvezde. Porodica Sinđelić I njihovi najbliži prijatelji nastavljaju da nas zasmejavaju ali i uče važnim porodičnim vrednostima, i u dobru i u zlu su zajedno.

programmes.t: TV prodaja: Biostile - Vaše zdravlje, naša briga
programmes.d: Program za sve ljubitelje kupovine iz topline svog doma, bez odlaska bilo gde! Tv prodaja je pravo mesto za vas!

Komedija Srećna porodica Rale i Mare, koja će se premijerno emitovati od utorka do petka od 22.15. Neobična porodica, koju čine Rale, Mare (Rastko Janković i Marija Veljković) i dvoje dece, useljava se u svoj prvi, zajednički stan. Sa njima se useljavaju i njihove različitosti, nade, ambicije, ali i problemi.

Emisija Želim da ti kažem je kolažni program koji se uživo emituje iz studija devesetdvojke, a koju vode Teodora Todorović i Marina Kotevski. Emisija svakog dana ima glavnu temu koju voditeljke obrađuju uz pomoć gostiju u studiju iz nešto drugačijeg ugla, ali i na određenu temu pokrivaju sve uglove i sa svojim gostima svaki od njih komentarišu. Bilo da su u pitanju aktuelne teme, simbolika, društveni fenomeni o kojima treba pričati, Teodora i Marina su tu da za gledaoce temu predstave na najbolji način.
Najnovije vesti, sportski događaji, ekonomija, kulturna dešavanja, lifestyle, video, sve o putovanjima, novosti iz sveta automobila, tehnologije i zdravlja.

U emisiji 7 TV dana sredom je tema Restart. Emisiju vodi naša poznata voditeljka Suzana Mančić. Suzana će sa svojim sagovornicima razgovarati o emocijama i njihovim životnim pričama. Pred vama su na B92 od 12.15 sredom inspirativni razgovori o ljubavi, životu, greškama i novim počecima, a Suzana otvara srca gostiju i publike.
Gledajte televizijsku prodaju, emisiju koja vam omogućava da pogledate ponudu različitih proizvoda i bez napuštanja doma obavite kupovinu!

Kviz Štoperica se sastoji iz dve runde, pri čemu se vreme za odgovaranje meri štopericom. U prvoj rundi takmičari odgovaraju na tri pitanja, a za svaki odgovor imaju na raspolaganju po 10 sekundi. Ukoliko tačno odgovore, osvajaju zagarantovanu sumu. U drugoj rundi ih čeka šest pitanja, sa po 20 sekundi za svaki odgovor. U zavisnosti od brzine i tačnosti odgovora koje daju, mogu da osvoje i do 15.000 dinara.

Te 2010. godine bila je najgledanjija turska drama, ali i najuspešnija turska produkcija u sezoni. Ovaj epitet zaslužila je činjenicom da je oborila sve dotadašnje rekorde gledanosti u svim zemljama u kojima je emitovana. Uključujići i Srbiju, gde je emitovana na kanalu Prve televizije. Zahvaljujući uspehu ove, ali i ostalih serijskih izdanja, vlasniku TIMS produkcije Timuru Savciju donelo je status najuspešnije produkcijske kuće u Turskoj. Seriju Kako vreme prolazi možete gledati ponovo na Prvoj od ovog ponedeljka u terminu od 16.00 i prisetiti se čuvenog moreplovca Alija! Podsetićemo vas ukratko na radnju serije - godina je 1967. i kapetan na dugim plovidbama, Ali Akarsu provodi dosta vremena daleko od svoje porodice. U međuvremenu se njegova supruga Džemile brine za njihovo četvero dece. Ona preuzima ulogu i oca i majke dok je njen muž na putovanju. Jednog dana se Ali konačno vraća kući sa putovanja... Svi članovi porodice veruju da se glava kuće vraća, ali ne znaju da će životi da im se promene nakon njegovog povratka. Pojavljuje se njegova mračna strana, i njegovo ponašanje je krajnje neobično. Džemile u Alijevom džepu pronalazi pismo koje će da podstakne niz događaja zaslužnih za velike preokrete u životima porodice Akarsu. Pismo će da otkrije njegovu tajnu – ljubavnu aferu sa strankinjom. Da li će Džemile da oprostiti mužu izdaju? Koga će Ali odabrati? Davno voljenu suprugu ili mladu ljubavnicu?

Najnovije vesti, sportski događaji, ekonomija, kulturna dešavanja, lifestyle, video, sve o putovanjima, novosti iz sveta automobila, tehnologije i zdravlja.

Pregled najvažnijih sportski događaja dana i sedmice pogledajte u emisiji B92 sportki pregled. Ekskluzivni snimci, aktuelni intervjui i kvalitetne analize doneće vam jasan uvid u najvažnije događaje iz sveta sporta.
Društveni, dnevno-politički i ekonomski događaji, ali i najnovija dešavanja u oblasti kulture, medija i sporta koja su važna za Srbiju, region i svet...

Na televiziju B92 radnim danima od 20.00 stiže domaći kviz koji spaja sreću, znanje i zabavu – uz dvoje harizmatičnih voditelja koje ćete obožavati Vladimira Đorđevića i Vericu Mihajlović. Inspirisan kultnim formatom Wheel of Fortune, kviz Kolo sreće donosi dinamičnu igru u kojoj troje takmičara pokušava da pogodi skrivene reči i fraze, zavrti točak i osvoji vredne nagrade. Gledajte Kolo sreće radnim danima od 20.00 televiziji B92!, jer uz Vladimira i Vericu, svaka epizoda biće prava mala avantura.

Miki je spreman da pođe u Keniju i Ugandu, baš kao Josip Broz Tito, davne 1970. godine. Ali pre toga, moraće da ode u Zaječar kako bi iznenadio Dejana i njegovu izabranicu Šeron, koja je zbog ljubavi napustila Najrobi i odlučila da živi u Srbiji. Međutim, da bi Dejan dobio blagoslov Šeroninog oca za brak, u obavezi je da omogući organizaciju tradicionalne kenijske svadbe, koja između ostalog podrazumeva i kupovinu krave i koza. Pogledajte ovu uzbudljivu epizodu i saznajte kako je došlo do toga da se uloge zamene i Dejan postane taj koji je iznenadio Mikija, šta o ovoj emisiji misli Šeronina porodica, a šta o samom paru ima da kaže Dejanov komšiluk.

Serija Pelagijin venac na programu je radnim danima od 21.00, a koliko smo imali priliku da vidimo - ako se nije desilo u Pelagijinom vencu, nije se desilo uopšte. Tom krilaticom u Pelagjinom vencu su likovi međusobno isprepletani u poslovnim, rodbinskim, (ne)prijateljskim i komšijskim odnosima. Zajedno oni kreiraju živote i unutrašnju dinamiku ulice u kojoj žive. To su ljudi uglavnom srednjeg staleža koji sebi daju za pravo da se mešaju jedni drugima u živote, vire kroz prozor i zabadaju noseve, ali kada je potrebno, u kriznim momentima, sve barijere padaju i oni pokazuju ljudskost, ujedinjeni protiv zajedničkih neprijatelja – stranih okupatora - investitora i došljaka. Smeh i dobre vibracije na B92 donose glumci Bransilav Jerković, Jana ilić Milić, Danina Jeftić, Nina Grahovac, Petar Vasiljević, Frano Lasić, Jadranka Selec i mnogi drugi.

Priča postaje još napetija kako futuristička hronika života Katnis Everdin ulazi u novo poglavlje. Igre su možda zauvek uništene, ali borba za preživljavanje postaje sve žešća. Katnis će morati da bude hrabrija i jača nego ikad u borbi sa svemoćnim Kapitolom. Shvata da nema izbora osim da razapne krila i prigrli simbol Ptice rugalice, a kako bi spasila Pita ona mora da postane vođa. Katnis se na početku filma budi u mračnom i razorenom, navodno više nepostojećem, Okrugu 13. Ubrzo će biti suočena sa strašnom istinom da je Okrug 12 uništen, a Pita zarobljen, izmanipulisan i pod uticajem predsednika Snoua na Kapitolu. Katnis ujedno saznaje i za tajnu pobunu koja se iz Okruga 13 širi Panemom, a u centru u kojem će se ubrzo i sama naći...

programmes.t: Novogodišnji vatromet i dron šou - Beograd na vodi
programmes.d: Dočekajte 2026. godinu na pravi način i uživajte u kadrovima spektakularnog vatrometa iz Beograda!

Tom krilaticom u Pelagjinom vencu su likovi međusobno isprepletani u poslovnim, rodbinskim, (ne)prijateljskim i komšijskim odnosima. Zajedno oni kreiraju živote i unutrašnju dinamiku ulice u kojoj žive. To su ljudi uglavnom srednjeg staleža koji sebi daju za pravo da se mešaju jedni drugima u živote, vire kroz prozor i zabadaju noseve, ali kada je potrebno, u kriznim momentima, sve barijere padaju i oni pokazuju ljudskost, ujedinjeni protiv zajedničkih neprijatelja – stranih okupatora - investitora i došljaka. Smeh i dobre vibracije na B92 donose glumci Bransilav Jerković, Jana ilić Milić, Danina Jeftić, Nina Grahovac, Petar Vasiljević, Frano Lasić, Jadranka Selec i mnogi drugi.

Priča postaje još napetija kako futuristička hronika života Katnis Everdin ulazi u novo poglavlje. Igre su možda zauvek uništene, ali borba za preživljavanje postaje sve žešća. Katnis će morati da bude hrabrija i jača nego ikad u borbi sa svemoćnim Kapitolom. Shvata da nema izbora osim da razapne krila i prigrli simbol Ptice rugalice, a kako bi spasila Pita ona mora da postane vođa. Katnis se na početku filma budi u mračnom i razorenom, navodno više nepostojećem, Okrugu 13. Ubrzo će biti suočena sa strašnom istinom da je Okrug 12 uništen, a Pita zarobljen, izmanipulisan i pod uticajem predsednika Snoua na Kapitolu. Katnis ujedno saznaje i za tajnu pobunu koja se iz Okruga 13 širi Panemom, a u centru u kojem će se ubrzo i sama naći...

Kviz Štoperica se sastoji iz dve runde, pri čemu se vreme za odgovaranje meri štopericom. U prvoj rundi takmičari odgovaraju na tri pitanja, a za svaki odgovor imaju na raspolaganju po 10 sekundi. Ukoliko tačno odgovore, osvajaju zagarantovanu sumu. U drugoj rundi ih čeka šest pitanja, sa po 20 sekundi za svaki odgovor. U zavisnosti od brzine i tačnosti odgovora koje daju, mogu da osvoje i do 15.000 dinara.

Serija Kolo sreće je romantični triler o skomnoj ženi koja se bori sa svim nedaćama koje nosi život samohrane majke dvoje odrasle dece. Rastrzana između želje da obezbedi novac za opstanak svoje porodice i brige o ukućanima, Mara Raketić doživeće obrt kakav se dešava retkima - dobija na lutriji i postaje jedna od najbogatijih osoba u zemlji. Sa Marinim bogatstvom, međutim, krenuće da se raspliću velike tajne i intrige koje ljudi oko nje imaju, ali najveća tajna je ona koju Mara nosi od rane mladosti.

U emisiji 7 TV dana sredom je tema Restart. Emisiju vodi naša poznata voditeljka Suzana Mančić. Suzana će sa svojim sagovornicima razgovarati o emocijama i njihovim životnim pričama. Pred vama su na B92 od 12.15 sredom inspirativni razgovori o ljubavi, životu, greškama i novim počecima, a Suzana otvara srca gostiju i publike.

Uživajte u najboljem izboru crtanih filmova za decu, ali i odrasle koji žele da pobegnu od svakodnevnih obaveza i na trenutak se vrate u najbezbrižnije doba. Donosimo vam avanture živopisnih junaka koji garantuju smeh i dobru zabavu!

Ljubitelje sjajne serije Sinđelići obradovaće vest da će se od danas emitovati nove epizode na Prvoj televiziji. Dogodovštine najpoznatije porodice gledaoci će moći da prate radnim danima od 21 sat. Peta sezona obilovaće brojnim, zanimljivim zapletima, preokretima I komičnim situacijama u kojima će se Sreten i Jezda, uz veliku pomoć Fedora naći pred novim izazovima u poslu s kafanom, dok Eva i Metodije postaju roditelji, a novopečena baka Lila odlazi u Francusku kako bi im pomogla oko prinove. Sreten upada u niz zavrzlama u Lilinom odsusustvu u pokušaju da porodicu održi u najboljem mogućem redu, kao da je Lila prisutna. Gojko i Tereza su i dalje zaljubljeni jedno u drugo, kao i Kasija i Rista, ali neprestano upadaju u zabune koje ih uporno razdvajaju. Gojko stiče status jutjub zvezde. Porodica Sinđelić I njihovi najbliži prijatelji nastavljaju da nas zasmejavaju ali i uče važnim porodičnim vrednostima, i u dobru i u zlu su zajedno.

programmes.t: TV prodaja: Biostile - Vaše zdravlje, naša briga
programmes.d: Program za sve ljubitelje kupovine iz topline svog doma, bez odlaska bilo gde! Tv prodaja je pravo mesto za vas!

Upoznali ste ga kao paklenog kuvara, a sada nam se predstavlja u drugačijem svetlu. Od nedelje 9. marta u treminu od 9.30 na televiziji B92 Saša Mišić je kralj slatkiša. Emisija Slatkara je kulinarski šou za prave sladokusce, čak slađa i od prvog poljupca Poznati kuvar Saša Mišić preporučivaće vam nedeljom od 9.30 razne poslastice, ali i pokazati vam kako da ih pripremite. Slatki zalogaji iz kuhinje ovog vrsnog majstora svog zanata biće sigurno ukusni. Ali, nemojte da vas njegovo ogromno znanje spreči da probate i sami da napravite neke od ovih slasnih poslastica, jer ako pažljivo pratite recept uspećete sigurno - to vam garantuju Saša Mišić i Slatkara.

Emisija Želim da ti kažem je kolažni program koji se uživo emituje iz studija devesetdvojke, a koju vode Teodora Todorović i Marina Kotevski. Emisija svakog dana ima glavnu temu koju voditeljke obrađuju uz pomoć gostiju u studiju iz nešto drugačijeg ugla, ali i na određenu temu pokrivaju sve uglove i sa svojim gostima svaki od njih komentarišu. Bilo da su u pitanju aktuelne teme, simbolika, društveni fenomeni o kojima treba pričati, Teodora i Marina su tu da za gledaoce temu predstave na najbolji način.
Najnovije vesti, sportski događaji, ekonomija, kulturna dešavanja, lifestyle, video, sve o putovanjima, novosti iz sveta automobila, tehnologije i zdravlja.

Četvrtak na B92 od 12.15 rezervisan je za emisiju 7 TV dana: Priče šampiona. Voditelj četvrtkom je naš proslavljeni sportista Nikola Rađen, koji će sa svojim gostima razgovarati o sportu i zabavi. Čućete sportske legende u neformalnim razgovorima, izazovima i igrama.
Gledajte televizijsku prodaju, emisiju koja vam omogućava da pogledate ponudu različitih proizvoda i bez napuštanja doma obavite kupovinu!

Kviz Štoperica se sastoji iz dve runde, pri čemu se vreme za odgovaranje meri štopericom. U prvoj rundi takmičari odgovaraju na tri pitanja, a za svaki odgovor imaju na raspolaganju po 10 sekundi. Ukoliko tačno odgovore, osvajaju zagarantovanu sumu. U drugoj rundi ih čeka šest pitanja, sa po 20 sekundi za svaki odgovor. U zavisnosti od brzine i tačnosti odgovora koje daju, mogu da osvoje i do 15.000 dinara.

Te 2010. godine bila je najgledanjija turska drama, ali i najuspešnija turska produkcija u sezoni. Ovaj epitet zaslužila je činjenicom da je oborila sve dotadašnje rekorde gledanosti u svim zemljama u kojima je emitovana. Uključujići i Srbiju, gde je emitovana na kanalu Prve televizije. Zahvaljujući uspehu ove, ali i ostalih serijskih izdanja, vlasniku TIMS produkcije Timuru Savciju donelo je status najuspešnije produkcijske kuće u Turskoj. Seriju Kako vreme prolazi možete gledati ponovo na Prvoj od ovog ponedeljka u terminu od 16.00 i prisetiti se čuvenog moreplovca Alija! Podsetićemo vas ukratko na radnju serije - godina je 1967. i kapetan na dugim plovidbama, Ali Akarsu provodi dosta vremena daleko od svoje porodice. U međuvremenu se njegova supruga Džemile brine za njihovo četvero dece. Ona preuzima ulogu i oca i majke dok je njen muž na putovanju. Jednog dana se Ali konačno vraća kući sa putovanja... Svi članovi porodice veruju da se glava kuće vraća, ali ne znaju da će životi da im se promene nakon njegovog povratka. Pojavljuje se njegova mračna strana, i njegovo ponašanje je krajnje neobično. Džemile u Alijevom džepu pronalazi pismo koje će da podstakne niz događaja zaslužnih za velike preokrete u životima porodice Akarsu. Pismo će da otkrije njegovu tajnu – ljubavnu aferu sa strankinjom. Da li će Džemile da oprostiti mužu izdaju? Koga će Ali odabrati? Davno voljenu suprugu ili mladu ljubavnicu?

Najnovije vesti, sportski događaji, ekonomija, kulturna dešavanja, lifestyle, video, sve o putovanjima, novosti iz sveta automobila, tehnologije i zdravlja.

Pregled najvažnijih sportski događaja dana i sedmice pogledajte u emisiji B92 sportki pregled. Ekskluzivni snimci, aktuelni intervjui i kvalitetne analize doneće vam jasan uvid u najvažnije događaje iz sveta sporta.

U vremenu brzih sadržaja i kratke pažnje, emisija Nedelja sa Nedeljkovićem donosi drugačiji televizijski ritam – sporiji, dublji i iskreniji. Reč je o emotivno-dokumentarnom formatu koji u fokus vraća ljude koji su svojim radom, talentom i upornošću obeležili naše vreme. Kroz intimne i nenametljive razgovore, publika ima priliku da upozna ljudsku stranu poznatih ličnosti – vrhunskih sportista, glumaca, umetnika, naučnika, producenata i preduzetnika. Emisija ne govori samo o uspesima, već i o padovima, dilemama, žrtvama i trenucima koji su ih oblikovali kao ljude. Cilj emisije Nedelja sa Nedeljkovićem jeste da ponovo osvetli one koji su zadužili srpski sport, umetnost i društvo, pružajući im prostor da ispričaju svoju priču onako kako je doživljavaju iznutra – bez senzacionalizma, sa emocijom i poštovanjem. Kroz njihove reči jasno se poručuje da su rad, upornost, borbenost i strast ključni faktori svakog uspeha. Poruka mladima je snažna i jasna: nije presudan status, već ljubav prema onome što radiš.

Na televiziju B92 radnim danima od 20.00 stiže domaći kviz koji spaja sreću, znanje i zabavu – uz dvoje harizmatičnih voditelja koje ćete obožavati Vladimira Đorđevića i Vericu Mihajlović. Inspirisan kultnim formatom Wheel of Fortune, kviz Kolo sreće donosi dinamičnu igru u kojoj troje takmičara pokušava da pogodi skrivene reči i fraze, zavrti točak i osvoji vredne nagrade. Gledajte Kolo sreće radnim danima od 20.00 televiziji B92!, jer uz Vladimira i Vericu, svaka epizoda biće prava mala avantura.

Te 2010. godine bila je najgledanjija turska drama, ali i najuspešnija turska produkcija u sezoni. Ovaj epitet zaslužila je činjenicom da je oborila sve dotadašnje rekorde gledanosti u svim zemljama u kojima je emitovana. Uključujići i Srbiju, gde je emitovana na kanalu Prve televizije. Serijal 48 sati svadba na televiziji B92 je subotom i nedeljom od 22.00, a ova epizoda donosi potpuno neočekivanu priču! Miki je spreman da pođe u Keniju i Ugandu, baš kao Josip Broz Tito, davne 1970. godine. Ali pre toga, moraće da ode u Zaječar kako bi iznenadio Dejana i njegovu izabranicu Šeron, koja je zbog ljubavi napustila Najrobi i odlučila da živi u Srbiji. Međutim, da bi Dejan dobio blagoslov Šeroninog oca za brak, u obavezi je da omogući organizaciju tradicionalne kenijske svadbe, koja između ostalog podrazumeva i kupovinu krave i koza. Pogledajte ovu uzbudljivu epizodu i saznajte kako je došlo do toga da se uloge zamene i Dejan postane taj koji je iznenadio Mikija, šta o ovoj emisiji misli Šeronina porodica, a šta o samom paru ima da kaže Dejanov komšiluk.

Serija Pelagijin venac na programu je radnim danima od 21.00, a koliko smo imali priliku da vidimo - ako se nije desilo u Pelagijinom vencu, nije se desilo uopšte. Tom krilaticom u Pelagjinom vencu su likovi međusobno isprepletani u poslovnim, rodbinskim, (ne)prijateljskim i komšijskim odnosima. Zajedno oni kreiraju živote i unutrašnju dinamiku ulice u kojoj žive. To su ljudi uglavnom srednjeg staleža koji sebi daju za pravo da se mešaju jedni drugima u živote, vire kroz prozor i zabadaju noseve, ali kada je potrebno, u kriznim momentima, sve barijere padaju i oni pokazuju ljudskost, ujedinjeni protiv zajedničkih neprijatelja – stranih okupatora - investitora i došljaka. Smeh i dobre vibracije na B92 donose glumci Bransilav Jerković, Jana ilić Milić, Danina Jeftić, Nina Grahovac, Petar Vasiljević, Frano Lasić, Jadranka Selec i mnogi drugi.

U velikom finalu epskog globalnog fenomena Igre gladi, Ketnis Everdin shvata da je na kocki mnogo više od pukog preživljavanja, a to je borba za budućnost! Narod Panema je u punom ratu, a Ketnis se u finalnom sukobu suočava sa predsednikom Snouom. Naime, sa najvernijim prijateljima organizuje pokušaj ubistva predsednika koji postaje sve više opsednut željom da je uništi. Smrtonosne zamke, neprijatelji, teški i moralno sumnjivi izbori za Ketnis biće mnogo veći izazov od bilo koje arene u kojoj se do sada borila u Igrama gladi.

Elephant, Giraffe and Rabbit sure know some moves. Join them as they count and dance!
One, two, buckle my shoe; Three, four, shut the door… Counting is the best! Lets join Charlie and the Numbers in this popular and cheerful song and count from one to ten.
Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!

Hey, Diddle, Diddle is a joyful nursery rhyme that dates back to the sixteenth century and sings of a fiddle-playing cat, a delighted cow, a curious dog, a dish, and a spoon. Adorable characters that every toddler has fun with playing, dancing, and singing along.
The Itsy-Bitsy Spider is trying to climb the waterspout, but with no luck. The rain keeps washing it out. Perhaps the sun can help the poor little spider?
Put on your leg warmers and join the fun as Squirrel, Elephant, Hippo, Sheep and Rabbit shape up while touching their head, shoulders, knees, and toes!
All My Friends is a fun and cheerful childrens rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.

The entire family is having fun playing football outside when it starts raining! With a little help from their imagination, the family finds a fun way of playing football indoors!
Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep and Baby wash, iron and mend their clothes, sweep and scrub the floor and bake bread. And then they all go round the mulberry bush on a cold and frosty morning!
Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!

Everyone shares in the fun when singing Ten Green Bottles. Baby, Hippo, Elephant, Turtle, Sheep, Rabbit, Squirrel and Giraffe all manage to knock off one of the bottles until there are no bottles left.
Little Lola has fun staying home playing with her pets. She throws her dog a stick and gives some milk to her cat. Pets are fun!
Charlie, Lola and all their animal friends come together in this fun and humorous rendition of The Farmer in the Dell.
The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.

Old King Cole was a merry old soul, and a merry old soul was he. Join Old King Cole and his three fiddlers in this merry folk nursery rhyme.
Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Lets ride together! Yay!
Giraffe and baby giraffe go on a magical journey before bedtime - flying on a mocking bird, meeting goats, bulls and a dog and riding a merry-go-round. Sweet Dreams.

Baby Butterfly tucks everyone in bed sending them off to a peaceful sleep - Elephant, Draco, Oliver, Charlie and Lola. Good night everyone.
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

Join Draco as he learns the difference between open and shut as he tries to open the cupboard door with a key to look for his missing jigsaw puzzle piece. After opening the first cupboard, another key is found, but will Draco find his missing piece?

Needles wants to play the drums in the park, when Lale the ukulele joins him their music wakes up a family of bats sleeping in a tree. Needles and Lale play a soft lullaby to help the bats go to sleep.

Maya and Yaya are having fun playing hide and go seek in the woods. Where can they be? Maybe behind the bush or behind the tree? Join the two cute elephants as they enjoy playing with each other and with Momo who joins the game and plays with them all day until its time for the friends to go home!
Your kids will love to relax with BabyTVs characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

Magic World is a captivating childrens program on Baby TV, combining fun and education in every episode. The series showcases delightful animated characters who explore an enchanting realm filled with mythical creatures. Throughout their adventures, young viewers gain essential life lessons, stimulate their imaginations, and learn basic concepts like colors, shapes, and numbers. With its lively music, interactive segments, and engaging narratives, Magic World is crafted to entertain and educate the youngest audience, providing a safe and enriching environment for kids to discover and enjoy new experiences.

Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Oceans coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programmes tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.
M the Magician wants to show off his wonderful magic tricks at the alphabet party. The problems begin when he accidently turns himself into a mouse! Come see how it all turns out.
Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.

Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Australia. John blows into a hollow branch so that his friends can hear him after he gets stuck on a tree! Listen to the didgeridoo and come and rescue too!

Roady, Trucky and Voom Vam go to the beach to cool off on a hot summers day. When they get to the beach, they hear a bird stuck on the littered beach. The friends quickly clean up the beach to help the bird.
The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.
Harley and Perry go apple picking. They find a huge apple they really want to pick but they discover theres a cute worm living inside the apple!
Walter and Dude are looking for an item that plays music, is round and goes bang bang. Is it a hammer or a cake? Join the two friends as they discover its a drum!
Mother Duck goes out with her five little ducklings. Each one is fascinated by something along the way. Luckily, they all find their way back in the end.
Snail is in big trouble. Kitty has shrunk him with her magic wand! This is a job for Olly the superhero!
The three buggies play hide and seek. Will Hop be able to find Laz and Butterson? And will Butterson be able to get out of his hiding place? You dont want to miss out on the fun.

Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things dont go quite as expected but thats part of the fun.
The friends enjoy swinging on the new swing except for Uh Oh who is afraid. Join Uh Oh as he discovers that what really helps overcome fear is ones inner self. Happy swinging!
Its snowing in the bath! Join Ducky, Ellie and Froggy as they ski over the snow and meet a big snowman and a friendly penguin! Come play ball and enjoy sliding on the cool ice!
Black Sheep has really got her friends covered! She knits sweaters for Rabbit, Giraffe and Baby and to keep them extra warm she also makes them a scarf and hat!

What will Oliver find in the closet? Help Oliver look for his yellow glove! Join Oliver as he has lots of fun dressing up with a cowboy hat and jesters hat! Come along and enjoy the cuddly surprise in the drawer! Is it a scarf? No, its a cute cat, of course! Meow!
Charlie wants to build a house with blocks for his friend the mouse but it keeps on falling. Charlie doesnt give up until he manages to build mousie a mansion!
Join Gaya the Fairy as she dives deep into the sea and discovers the life of the seahorse and how seahorses reproduce and create a beautiful family.

A pencil arrives at Zeinas doorstep, forgetting what it is used for. Using her detective skill and her best friend Roy, Zeina discovers that a pencil is used for flying in space, like a rocket ship... is it?
Everyone ready? Its time to learn how to fly! Mama bird teaches her three chicks how to fly. Clark and Linda catch on quick but Billy is a bit apprehensive...
Teeny and Tiny try to figure out what is hiding underneath the handkerchief. What can it be? Come join them as they solve riddles and play games.

Mikes bike shop is a place everyone goes to when they have a problem to solve. Be it big or small, Mike is always there to help his friends with his unique, quirky, and funny inventions, that put a smile on everyones face. The series puts a new spin on the phrase – if at first you dont succeed – try and try again (and again, and again).

Mick wants to plant a flower. Join Mick as he digs up the soil with a shovel and puts it in a wheelbarrow, fills a flower pot with soil and plants a flower. Grab a watering can and help Mick water his beautiful flower!
Join the seashells dance on the beach and two sweet creatures made from shells as they sail.
London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out - Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.

Billy and BamBam go out to the garden to take down the washing. Join them as they have fun playing an imaginative game with the washing basket, turning it into a boat, splashing with paddles and sailing the sea!
If you want to explore the beautiful jungle, you must look, listen, and... smell. This way, youll know exactly when the rain is coming! Can you think of creative ways to make a shelter?

The friends stumble upon a green frog and follow it all the way to a field, where they meet a nice worm and a shy snail.

Henry wants to eat tasty spinach pie but Chef George is out of spinach. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find spinach. There isnt any at the grocery store or in the market, but there is spinach in the field, where it grows! Come along and enjoy healthy spinach pie with Henry!

Walter and Dude the Dog are looking for an item that is yellow, cute, and squeaks. Is it a banana, a toy car, or perhaps Walter himself? Join the two friends as they discover its a rubber duckie bath toy!

What will Oliver discover in a stable? Come along and see what the horse likes eating! A sandwich, ice cream or perhaps hay? Join Oliver as he has lots of fun riding on a rocking horse, giving the horse a haircut and galloping! Giddy up!
Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!

When a caterpillar comes to visit the island, things get a little out of hand as Lily accidentally throws him off her after a fit of laughter. Alls well that ends well as the foursome get to see the amazing transformation of the caterpillar into a beautiful butterfly

Henry wants to eat tasty onion soup but Chef George is out of onions. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find onions. There arent any at the grocery store or in the market, but there are onions in the field, where they grow! Come along and enjoy amazing onion soup with Henry!
Harley and Perry play football together. Perry turns out to be quite a talented player. When its Harleys turn, shes not as successful. Will she score a goal in the end?
Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Lets ride together! Yay!

Join Charlie and Number Three on their search for three missing wheels for Number Threes ice cream wagon. Using a fishing rod, Charlie manages to fish the wheels and place them back on the wagon, and the two friends set out to the Numbers Party!

Billy and Bam Bam continue to play pretend and have fun singing the classic rhyme Miss Polly had a Dolly and treat Billys doll who is sick.

Tickles gives his friends lemonade from a machine he built, but its not tasty. Join Tickles as he realizes that the best lemonade in the world is one that he makes on his own!
Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Lets ride together! Yay!
Petite has a serious problem - she cant stop her bike! Who is she going to turn to for help? Mikey of course!
Pix and Leo are envious of the chicks getting a flying lesson from mama bird. They also want to fly. But flying without wings is not so easy...
Kitty is stuck in a tree and is too scared to come down. Luckily, Olly is a brave firefighter today and is ready to save the day
Songs and Rhymes (remake)
Roady and Trucky surprise Voom Vam on a cold Winters day. Instead of being stuck inside all day, the adventurous gang go skating on the frozen lake! But things dont go according to plan....

Come along and sail the high seas! Meet a cute dog, an adorable dolphin and fabulous fish on your exciting journey! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates an amazing bird using wood, pinecones, logs, nuts and a stick!
Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.
Kim and Kit are making fruit juice! Lemons, oranges, grapefuits - they have it all. Come see what happens when Kit gets carried away and makes hat juice!
Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Canada. The friends want to eat pancakes but have no peanut butter! Find out the forest guards secret about maple trees and taste sweet maple syrup!
Charlie wants to build a house with blocks for his friend the mouse but it keeps on falling. Charlie doesnt give up until he manages to build mousie a mansion!
Join Gaya the Fairy as she says hello to the moon, daytime and night, when the sun rises, and the moon phases when its full and round, and as the days go by the moon gets slenderer.
Whats more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters - Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A dresser to store small and cute items!
Its winter in the jungle and Mowgli discovers that not having any fur can be a disadvantage. Baloo, Leela and Gray find creative waves to keep Mowgli warm.

Mick wants to have a tea party. Join Mick as he has lots of fun getting ready for the fancy party! He spreads out a nice tablecloth on the table, and prepares a teapot, colorful mugs, napkins and a delicious cake! Come along and enjoy the tea party with Mick and rabbit!
Help save the planet! Take a dive and clean up the ocean. While youre at it, get a few of your fish friends to help you
All your favorite BabyTV characters are rolling over in the bed. Be careful not to fall out!

Maya opens a new hair salon and invites Yaya to get a new hairstyle. Maya shampoos, washes, rinses, washes and blow dries Yayas hair but Yaya doesnt like it! Join the two cute elephants to see how Maya ends up with a new hairstyle and how Yaya learns to like his new look as well!
Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!

Join Draco as he learns the difference between opposites - in and out - by jumping in and out of his toy cart after loosening the cart from his tail. Come laugh, play and have lots of fun with Draco as he rides his cart!
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!
Its time to relax, slow down and unwind with Kiku. Calming visuals and soft music are great ways to prepare for bed.

When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Hallo, namaste, annyeonghaseyo - Hello has different names - in German, Hindi or Korean. Lets greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.
In this fun and popular counting rhyme for kids, the five little hungry mice are climbing a pot of rice to have a yummy feast.

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the balls, bagels and parts to create a cute monkey! Come along and see the beautiful banana tree that Grandpa plants! Climb with monkey, eat tasty bananas and have fun dancing around the tree!
Black Sheep has really got her friends covered! She knits sweaters for Rabbit, Giraffe and Baby and to keep them extra warm she also makes them a scarf and hat!
Whats more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters - Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!
Come ride through the town with your favorite BabyTV characters - Baby Butterfly, Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep, Rabit and Squirrel. Riding a bus has never been more fun!
Lale and Lolu climb tall pyramids and play ancient ball games in the jungle.
Join the musicians as they play beautiful sounds of Presto by Mozart. Step into the lively world of music as you have fun riding at the playground.
Meet the clever little teapot, short and stout. It has a little handle and spout, and when it sings and whistles, just pour it out.
Squirrel is sleeping soundly when the fairy Ki takes him on a magical journey in the sky. Join them as they float through the stars and the moon.

Ducky, Ellie and Froggy are covered with paint after painting! Its time for a bath! Join the friends as they have fun scrubbing themselves! Ducky is afraid to shampoo his hair! He doesnt want any soap to enter his eyes! Come along and see how goggles come to the rescue!
Oliver learns when he needs to wash his hands - before eating, after going to the potty, and after playing with his good friend Lola.
The ants march along carrying cherries, oranges and other goodies from the picnic basket and find shelter from the rain.

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about Grannys exciting birthday trip! Join Teddy as he takes Granny on a train to visit the seaside and play in the soft sand! Visit the flowery hills and enjoy sweet honey from the bees! See the cool snow that Teddy brings from the mountain top! Happy Birthday Granny!

Maya and Yaya are at the beach. Maya goes in the water but Yaya is a bit scared, so he tries using a life saver, goggles, a snorkel and fins, but is still reluctant to go in. Join the two cute elephants to see what finally helps Yaya jump in the water! Come along and have lots of fun with Maya, Yaya and the colourful fish!

Join Draco as he learns the difference between opposites - empty and full. As Draco satisfies his hunger by eating delicious biscuits from a box, he gets an enjoyable taste of the concept of full versus empty.
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

Charlie has fun in the Bath! Join him as he washes his hair, scrubs himself with soap, makes bubbles and plays with his rubber duck. When hes nice and clean he puts on his pajamas and goes to bed. Good night Charlie!
Baby, Giraffe and Sheep have fun dancing in the rain with their umbrellas as Hippo tires to find some peace and quiet but keeps bumping his head.

Needles, Beavie and Bouncy are at the beach. Needles is busy building sandcastles while Beavie and Bouncy are busy splashing about. Needles has a hard time finishing his sandcastle when Beavie and Bouncy accidentally ruin it time and time again.

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the rings to make swing chains and all the parts to create a colourful playground! Come along and have fun going down the slide and swinging on the swing!
Baby butterfly picks roses and meets friends along the way - Hippo, Elephant, Turtle and more. Careful not to sneeze!
London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out - Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.
Lale and Lolu visit the magical world of ancient Egypt in the winter with its hieroglyphics, pyramids and colossal statues.

Join the marvelous musicians as they play lovely sounds of Rigaudon by Grieg. Step into the remarkable world of music as you have fun in the colourful toy room riding on a choo choo train and playing with toy blocks!
Old King Cole was a merry old soul, and a merry old soul was he. Join Old King Cole and his three fiddlers in this merry folk nursery rhyme.
Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends - Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his fun day with grandpa at the beach! Listen to Teddys story about grandpas tower of bears! See Teddy as he climbs the tower, catches a fluffy cloud and flies a beautiful kite high up in the sky!

Froggy and Ellie have fun in the bathtub blowing a flower and fish out of soap bubbles! Ducky wants to join them but how will he get there? Will he fly a bubble plane or hot air balloon? Come and see the bubbles as they connect to help Ducky join the friends!
Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the funny egg and shoes to the white ball! Add a face and hat to create a colourful clown! Come along and have fun dancing with clown! Juggle balls that turn into balloons!
Soothing music along with images from our surroundings is sure to put your little ones to sleep.
Lola has fun with all your favorite characters from the Tiny Bunch. Come join them as they sing the favorite classic This Old Man.
Lale and Lolu explore a colorful castle with a very colorful dragon who loves to play hide and seek.

When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ola, bonjour, hello - Hello has different names - in English, French or Spanish. Lets greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.
Join the musicians as they play beautiful sounds of Spring by Vivaldi. Step into the lively world of music as you have fun hanging out at the vegetable garden!
Oliver learns when he needs to wash his hands - before eating, after going to the potty, and after playing with his good friend Lola.
Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his adventures with dad while sailing on a boat! FinFin the dolphin comes to the rescue after Teddys tractor falls in the water along with dads sunglasses! Join FinFin as he takes Teddy on a journey underwater! Enjoy the fish, corals and special shells!

Froggy is blowing soap bubbles in the bathtub! Whos spraying water on him? Ellie is playing ball and Ducky is sleeping on a mattress! Who could it be? Come along and find out! Join the fun and have a great time splashing and laughing in the tub with all the friends and cloud too!

Its Robbies birthday and everyone has come to celebrate with him - Toto, Dolly, the ducks, Horse, Elephant and Cow. Come join the celebration as they all sing him a birthday song, eat cake and enjoy his gift.
All My Friends is a fun and cheerful childrens rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.
The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.
Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?
One, two, buckle my shoe; Three, four, shut the door… Counting is the best! Lets join Charlie and the Numbers in this popular and cheerful song and count from one to ten.
Toto and Robbie fly with their spaceship to wake up a sleepy star so it can shine through the night.
Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things dont go quite as expected but thats part of the fun.

Come clap your hands and stomp your feet with Lola as she rides horses and goes on a picnic with grandpa and grandma.
Baby Butterfly tucks everyone in bed sending them off to a peaceful sleep - Elephant, Draco, Oliver, Charlie and Lola. Good night everyone.

Put on your leg warmers and join the fun as Squirrel, Elephant, Hippo, Sheep and Rabbit shape up while touching their head, shoulders, knees, and toes!

After a fun filled day of playing outdoors its always nice to snuggle up in bed with a comfy blanket and pillow. Join your favorite BabyTV characters - Hippo, Giraffe, Rabbit, Squirrel, Butterfly and more as they get ready for bed with this soothing evening song.
Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!
Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep and Baby wash, iron and mend their clothes, sweep and scrub the floor and bake bread. And then they all go round the mulberry bush on a cold and frosty morning!
Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!

Everyone shares in the fun when singing Ten Green Bottles. Baby, Hippo, Elephant, Turtle, Sheep, Rabbit, Squirrel and Giraffe all manage to knock off one of the bottles until there are no bottles left.
What a great day for a boat ride on the lake! Baby, Hippo, Rabbit, Elephant, Giraffe and Sheep have fun singing Row Your Boat while actually rowing their boat!

Hey, Diddle, Diddle is a joyful nursery rhyme that dates back to the sixteenth century and sings of a fiddle-playing cat, a delighted cow, a curious dog, a dish, and a spoon. Adorable characters that every toddler has fun with playing, dancing, and singing along.
Baby Hippo is learning how to walk. On his way he meets a flying butterfly, a jumping frog and a crawling snail.

Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

The Itsy-Bitsy Spider is trying to climb the waterspout, but with no luck. The rain keeps washing it out. Perhaps the sun can help the poor little spider?
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

Join Draco as he opens up a present and discovers many colorful boxes in it which he opens up one by one. By playing this game, he learns the difference between opposites open and close and finds suitable boxes to place all his toy cars in!
Needles tries to paint his friend Florence the flower. When he uses the wrong colors, Florence gets upset. Come see how he mixes colors in order to paint Florence just right.

Maya and Yaya find a toy tractor and argue about who it belongs to. Yaya runs the tractor on the rocks but Maya says the rocks belong to her! Join the two cute elephants as they understand that its not much fun to play alone. Its best to play together! Come along and play with Maya, Yaya, Momo and the little hedgehog!
Your kids will love to relax with BabyTVs characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

Magic World is a captivating childrens program on Baby TV, combining fun and education in every episode. The series showcases delightful animated characters who explore an enchanting realm filled with mythical creatures. Throughout their adventures, young viewers gain essential life lessons, stimulate their imaginations, and learn basic concepts like colors, shapes, and numbers. With its lively music, interactive segments, and engaging narratives, Magic World is crafted to entertain and educate the youngest audience, providing a safe and enriching environment for kids to discover and enjoy new experiences.
