V loves playing his violin. Needless to say he is not happy when his violin get swallowed up by a vacuum cleaner. To make matters worse, the vacuum cleaner swallows Charlies tricycle as well! Will V and Charlie manage to get their beloved possessions back?
Old King Cole was a merry old soul, and a merry old soul was he. Join Old King Cole and his three fiddlers in this merry folk nursery rhyme.
Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Canada. The friends want to eat pancakes but have no peanut butter! Find out the forest guards secret about maple trees and taste sweet maple syrup!

Voom Vam and Roady get into an argument over a kite. Roady goes off on his own and gets stuck under a pile of rocks. Trucky and Voom Vam join forces to help get him out. Will Roady and Voom Vam make up and in the end?
Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!
Its Harleys birthday and Perry is throwing her a surprise party! Harley keeps on showing up while Perry is trying to decorate. Will Perry manage to surprise Harley?

Walter and Dude the Dog are looking for an item to speak with, has buttons to press, and goes ring ring. Is it a megaphone, a television, or a bell? Join the two friends as they discover its a telephone! Hello!
The ants march along carrying cherries, oranges and other goodies from the picnic basket and find shelter from the rain.
Ollys adventure is out of this world! Hes flying to the moon and Kitty, Dolly and Snail join in on the fun!
Butterson finds himself in a sticky situation after retrieving a ball from a high branch. Will he be able to get down safely? Come find out!

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
Come ride through the town with your favorite BabyTV characters - Baby Butterfly, Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep, Rabit and Squirrel. Riding a bus has never been more fun!
The friends are dancing except for Uh Oh who is home alone. When Yum Yum comes to see him, Uh Oh says he cant dance so Yum Yum teaches him and all the friends dance together!
Ducky, Ellie and Froggy want to take a bath but its empty! Cloud comes to fill it up with rain but the water disappears! Come and help find the plug to keep the water in the tub!
Join Charlie, Lola, Oliver, Hungry Henry, Draco, Billy and Bam Bam as they sing and dance together. Grab a friend or a parent and dance along with them - round and round and up and down!

What will Oliver discover while skiing? Join Oliver as he has fun riding on the cable car! Come along and wear your coat, gloves and ski goggles, of course! Enjoy skiing with Oliver on the snowy slopes and sledding with the penguins, elephant and giraffe!
Charlie plays hide and seek with his friend the chick. Is he in the box? Under the table? Maybe in the layundry basket? Come help him look!
Join Gaya the Fairy as she explores the wide desert, the boiling hot days and starry nights, the motions of the sun and the moon over the sand, the sunrise and sunset.

A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeinas doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the objects true use is revealed to them.
A group of bees arrives to practice their special routine on the island, but they always argue. Good thing that Coco the Conductor comes to the rescue.
Teeny and Tiny try to figure out what is hiding underneath the handkerchief. What can it be? Come join them as they solve riddles and play games.
Bunny is going to sleep over at Petites house! But how is she going to carry all her toys with her and ride her bike? Mikey has all the answers of course.

Mick is going to the beach. Join Mick as he sets out to explore the sunny beach and has lots of fun as he builds a sand castle using a bucket and shovel, swims with a swimming ring, licks a yellow popsicle, and enjoys the shade under the colorful parasol!

Come along and have lots of fun with corks! The bottle shakes and the cork pops! Come along and enjoy the breathtaking images created from corks! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a man with a feathered hat! See the girl with thumbtacks as earphones! Dance along with the cork creatures and have a ball!

Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!
Billy and BamBam are tidying up their room together. Join them as they build a tall tower and a long train from the building blocks and play the game of follow me hopping from block to block!
Its winter in the jungle and Mowgli discovers that not having any fur can be a disadvantage. Baloo, Leela and Gray find creative waves to keep Mowgli warm.
Mother Duck goes out with her five little ducklings. Each one is fascinated by something along the way. Luckily, they all find their way back in the end.

Come along and play ball! The green ball turns into an amazing hot air balloon! Join the friends for a fun ride! See small houses and trees from high above! Float on fluffy clouds and slide down a sparkling rainbow! Bounce back home on a colourful rainbow ball!
The Lollipops Song Series

Henry wants to eat a cold mango but Chef George is out of mangoes. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find mangoes. There arent any at the grocery store or in the market, but there are mangoes on the plantation, where they grow! Come along and enjoy a fresh mango with Henry!
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A clock to help the friends tell time!
Pix and Leo are envious of the chicks getting a flying lesson from mama bird. They also want to fly. But flying without wings is not so easy...
Kim and Kit are watering the vegetable patch. They vegetables need to wait patiently until Kit learns how to turn on the faucet and use the hose. Can and help him!
Walter and Dude are looking for an item that is tied with a string, needs wind and flies in the sky. Is it a pinwheel or a helicopter? Join them as they discover its a kite!
What will Oliver find on the farm? Join Oliver as he loves feeding the animals and shearing the sheeps wool! Come along and watch the children play in the hay and enjoy a fun ride in the tractor!

When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ola, bonjour, hello - Hello has different names - in English, French or Spanish. Lets greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.
Its the annual fish jumping contest and everyone wants to know who will jump the most amazing jump and win the star medal!

Henry wants to eat banana cake but Chef George is out of bananas. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find bananas. There arent any at the grocery store or in the market, but there are bananas on trees on a plantation, where they grow! Come along and enjoy banana cake with Henry!
Harley and Perry go on a visit to the botanical gardens. They water the flowers and watch them bloom. There is one stubborn flower that just wont bloom! Will Harley and Perry be able to help?
Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!

Join Charlie as he helps Number Two and Number Four resolve differences over sharing two crowns, and then saves them after they got stuck on a rainbow, earning the title of Prince Charlie, before they all set out to have fun at the Numbers Party!
Teeny and Tiny play which is the odd one out, play with fruit on a Ferris wheel and play the music game.
Have you ever danced in the forest with a penguin? Now you can! Come on - one hand in, one hand out - shake them all about!
Mr. Snail and country mouse are visiting city mouse in the city! Join them as they discover tasty cheese in the rubbish! Cat discovers the cheese as well! Who will enjoy the feast?
The entire family is having fun playing football outside when it starts raining! With a little help from their imagination, the family finds a fun way of playing football indoors!

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
Someone is having a birthday party and the bugs are all excited! But a strong gust of wind leaves Hop stranded on a balloon. Laz and Butterson find a clever way of helping him out.
Dino and his friend are off in search of the missing eggs. On their way they stumble upon footprints and dive into the ocean.
The Lollipops Song Series
A pan arrives at Zeinas doorstep, forgetting what it is used for. Using her detective skill and her best friend Roy, Zeina discovers that a pan is used for playing tennis... is it?

Billy and BamBam enjoy drawing a sun, grass and a colourful rainbow with their beautiful coloured pencils. Join them as they turn their colouring boxes into rattles and dance along with them at the carnival!
The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.
Dino and his friend go in search of the two missing eggs. On their quest they jump on geysers and search a cave.

Can you stand on your head? Come see blue triangle, orange triangle and line compete who can stand on their head the longest. When the shapes start to argue, Charlie needs to find them a game in which they dont compete.
Join Yum Yum and his friends as they enjoy eating a surprise lunch despite cooking flops. It turns out to be the tastiest lunch since what matters is that they are all together!

Little Cabin in the Woods is a popular and fun song that teaches toddlers and young children colors and shapes with yummy fruits. Join Baby TVs friends as they have fun learning and eating a strawberry, a banana, a plum, and an apple together.
Bunny dresses up as a unicorn and wants a suitable costume for her bicycle as well. Will Mikey be able to help her out?
Hey! A coconut just fell from the tree. Its fun to play with a coconut. Catch, Leo! Catch, Pix! But who will get it first?
Vroom vroom! Start your engines, its show time! Olly the race car driver is up against Snail. Who will win the trophy?
London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out - Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.

Trucky goes to clear some rocks that fell on the road. While trying to pick up a large boulder he turns over on his side and cant get up. Now its Roady and Voom Vams turn to help Trucky in his time of need.

Have lots of fun with paper bags! Create an elegant elephant and merry mouse with paper bags! Enjoy cherry picking with mouse and cat! Yummy! Meet the turkey family and play with cracked egg shells! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a lovely house from a paper bag! Home sweet home!
Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.
Kim wants Kit to be her audience while she sings, but Kit wants to perform too. If they perform together, who will be their audience? Come find out!

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Monaco. What happens when the driver cant find Monaco? Discover the Princesses solution! A pole with a flag! What colour will the flag be? Come and see!
Charlie wants to build a house with blocks for his friend the mouse but it keeps on falling. Charlie doesnt give up until he manages to build mousie a mansion!
Theres lots of water in the world. Join Gaya the Fairy as she explores the waterfalls, streams and lakes, and the fantastic cycle of water evaporation. Its raining, its pouring!
Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A dresser to store small and cute items!
The Itsy-Bitsy Spider is trying to climb the waterspout, but with no luck. The rain keeps washing it out. Perhaps the sun can help the poor little spider?
The two party-lovin monkeys, Adhira and Indra, have lost their toot-toot. Lets see if Baloo, Gray, Leela, and Mowgli can help them find it!

Good Morning! Join the amazing friends as they get ready for a wonderful day! Wake up as the bright sun tickles your eyes and sing a song! Brush your teeth, comb your hair and eat a tasty breakfast! Skip and hop, laugh and play and have a fantastic day! Hooray!

Grab your shopping list and come along! Join Mick as he has lots of fun riding the shopping cart through the Supermarket, placing some milk, fresh bread, and a red apple in his shopping basket. Bon Appetit!
Is your child good at drawing? Maybe hell be the next Leonardo De Vinci! Meanwhile watch him draw the Mona Lisa.
Walter and Dude are looking for a triangular item that you wear on your head and fits a clown costume. Is it a helmet or a triangle? Join them as they discover its a clowns hat!
Rabbit Jack leaves his front door open and catches a cold. He cant stop sneezing. His good friend Elephant makes him a hot cup of tea.
Its nighttime on the island and the friends have a lovely surprise. Stella the fish came to tell them a bedtime story. Except... everyone interrupts her.

Henry wants to eat a grapefruit but Chef George is out of grapefruits. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find a grapefruit. There arent any at the supermarket or in the market, but there are grapefruits on trees in the orchard, where they grow! Come along and enjoy a juicy grapefruit with Henry!
Its not easy falling asleep when someone in the room is singing or playing the guitar? What can you do? Join them and have a pajama party!
Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things dont go quite as expected but thats part of the fun.

Come play hide and seek with Charlie as he looks for Number Nine and finally finds him behind the red gate, with help from his two firefly friends. Then join them all as they hurry along to have fun singing and dancing at the Numbers Party!
Teeny and Tiny play whats hiding beneath the handkerchief, the music game and hide and seek
Wake up Kitty, its time to play! Lets jump on our toes and and put up our paws. Time to catch some flies!
Mr. Snail meets wonderful warblers in a thicket! Come along and play hide and seek with Mr. Snail and the warblers! Discover that the birds love resting in the winter!

Little Cabin in the Woods is a popular and fun song that teaches toddlers and young children colors and shapes with yummy fruits. Join Baby TVs friends as they have fun learning and eating a strawberry, a banana, a plum, and an apple together.

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
The buggies are playing in the sandbox when Hop gets stuck under a strainer! Butterson and Laz stuggle to get him out. Luckily they find a toy bulldozer in the yard in a remote control!
The Lollipops Song Series

What will Oliver discover in the flower field? Join Oliver as he has fun watering and picking beautiful flowers! Come along and sit on a big flower with Oliver and help find the happy bees! Where can they be?
An umbrella arrives at Zeinas doorstep, forgetting what it is used for. Using her detective skill and her best friend Roy, Zeina discovers that an umbrella is used for flying in the wind... is it?

Billy and Bam Bam have fun playing with their kites on a lovely spring day. When the kites get stuck in the tree, they are left with the strings and find imaginative ways to play with them. Join them as they sing and dance and wag their new tails!
Lola, Charlie and Henry are baking a delicous cake together. Come find out what you need in order to make the perfect cake!
Dino and his friend are off in search of the missing eggs. On their way they stumble upon footprints and dive into the ocean.

programmes.t: Snowies fun and frosty guessing games
programmes.d: Come play a cool guessing game in the snow with the adorable snowies! Guess which animal makes a whistling sound! Is it a cow or a seal? Join the cute snowman friends and have lots of fun as they create a wonderful whale!

Parallelogram the dancer cant find a stage to perform on. All her friends try to help by offering to be a stage but none are the right size. Will she be able to put on the show she promised her friends?
Everyone is getting ready for bedtime. Uh Oh fills his bed with items, but it breaks due to overload. Join all the friends as they cheer Uh Oh up by having fun and sleeping over!
Baby Hippo is learning how to walk. On his way he meets a flying butterfly, a jumping frog and a crawling snail.
Bunny is looking for something to cool her down while she rides her bicycle. Leave it up to Mikey to find a solution.
Leo is all about getting clean but Pix is having lots of fun getting dirty. Leo is set on getting Pix cleaned up. Will he succeed?
Dolly has gotten a magical package from her grandma. What can it be? Everyone is very curious. Come found out
After a night of snow, Voom Vam builds a huge snowmobile. After it starts snowing again, shes nowhere to be found. Trucky and Roady use a hairdryer to melt away the snow in order to find her.
What a great day for a boat ride on the lake! Baby, Hippo, Rabbit, Elephant, Giraffe and Sheep have fun singing Row Your Boat while actually rowing their boat!

Come along and sail the high seas! Meet a cute dog, an adorable dolphin and fabulous fish on your exciting journey! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates an amazing bird using wood, pinecones, logs, nuts and a stick!
Kim and Kit try to figure out where a squeaky noise is coming from. Could it be coming from Kit? Join Kim as she takes Kit apart. Will she be able to put him back together?
Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Lets ride together! Yay!

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Scotland. Kenny plays his pipe but one day it is lost! His family brings him many pipes. Which should he use? See how he connects them to create a bagpipe!
Charlie finds colorful boxes and discovers a magical and colorful world. Red tractors, white snowmen, pink flamingos - come see all the colors of the rainbow!
Join Gaya the Fairy as she welcomes the different daytime and nighttime animals around our planet, the day and the night, the sun and the moon, morning, noon, and evening.
The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A computer mouse to use with a computer!
Songs and Rhymes (remake)
If you want to explore the beautiful jungle, you must look, listen, and... smell. This way, youll know exactly when the rain is coming! Can you think of creative ways to make a shelter?

Its lunch time! Join the wonderful friends as they enjoy lunch in the middle of the day! Have a seat and eat a yummy lunch that fills up your tummy! Peas, broccoli and a tasty beet! Oh, what a treat! Take cute teddy in your lap and have a lovely nap!

Mick is getting ready to get dressed. Join him as he looks for his hat in the dresser, sees himself in the mirror, and has fun putting on a wonderful play with the pair of shorts and socks he found. See what happens when he takes off the shower cap he is wearing on his head!
Help save the planet! Take a dive and clean up the ocean. While youre at it, get a few of your fish friends to help you
C offers to take Charlie to the alphabet party in his brand new car; while going over the bridge, Cs car gets stuck. Will they make it in time to the Letters party?
Charlie, Lola and all their animal friends come together in this fun and humorous rendition of The Farmer in the Dell.
Join the loveable animal friends as they visit China. Chop, the driver, serves the King and Queen a meal, but wheres the cutlery? See how the village girl turns bamboo shoots into amazing chopsticks!

Trucky, Roady and Voom Vam are on a mission to save the wilting flowers. But how will they bring water to all the flowers in the field? Come see how the threesome get the huge water tank to the flowers in the field.
Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.
Harley and Perry get into a crazy contest over who will blow the largest soap bubble. Things get a bit out of hand when a huge soap bubble lifts their picnic table with all their cherries!
Walter and Dude are looking for an item that one looks through and the other smiles at. Is it a mirror or glasses? Join the two friends as they discover its a camera! Say Cheese!

Everyone shares in the fun when singing Ten Green Bottles. Baby, Hippo, Elephant, Turtle, Sheep, Rabbit, Squirrel and Giraffe all manage to knock off one of the bottles until there are no bottles left.
Olly is a pizza chef and he has a very tough customer. Snail cant decide what he wants on his pizza. Olly has an idea how to help
The buggy friends find a trampoline in the yard and are eager to start jumping. Butterson gets stuck in the trampoline and Laz and Hop find a creative way to help him out.

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
The Lollipops Song Series
Tickles cant stop sneezing! His friends bring him a whistle in case he needs help, but when he doesnt stop blowing it, they realize that he just doesnt want to be left alone!

Froggy and Ellie have fun in the bathtub blowing a flower and fish out of soap bubbles! Ducky wants to join them but how will he get there? Will he fly a bubble plane or hot air balloon? Come and see the bubbles as they connect to help Ducky join the friends!
All My Friends is a fun and cheerful childrens rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.

What will Oliver find at the swimming pool? Join Oliver as he fills the pool with cool water, has fun sipping fresh orange juice and enjoys licking cold ice cream! Come along and help Oliver blow up the beach ball till he floats high up in the air!
Charlie cant fall asleep. Luckily, he has his elephant friends to help him. They sing him a soothing lullaby that does the trick
Join Gaya the Fairy as she dives deep into the sea and discovers the life of the seahorse and how seahorses reproduce and create a beautiful family.

A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeinas doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the objects true use is revealed to them.
Lily is super excited - its the first time she is going to give pollen to a bee! Turns out shes a bit too excited and she cant stop sneezing.
Teeny and Tiny play hide and seek and imaginary games.

Mikes bike shop is a place everyone goes to when they have a problem to solve. Be it big or small, Mike is always there to help his friends with his unique, quirky, and funny inventions, that put a smile on everyones face. The series puts a new spin on the phrase – if at first you dont succeed – try and try again (and again, and again).

Mick wants to play a game of soccer. Grab your sneakers and join Mick as he has lots of fun playing soccer on the grass, blowing his whistle, and kicking the soccer ball straight into the net! What a goal!
In this fun and popular counting rhyme for kids, the five little hungry mice are climbing a pot of rice to have a yummy feast.

Have lots of fun with acorns and nuts! Come along and see the stunning creatures with corn kernel feet and leafy wings! Enjoy the wonderful nutty musical band as they play fine tunes! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates the band members with kernels, nuts, pinecones, acorns, leaves and sticks!

Billy and BamBam go out to the garden to take down the washing. Join them as they have fun playing an imaginative game with the washing basket, turning it into a boat, splashing with paddles and sailing the sea!
Everyone has their own special talent, and today youre going to meet the best talents in the jungle - Leela, Gray, Adhira, and Indra... but what about Mowgli? Whats his special talent?
Rabbit Jack leaves his front door open and catches a cold. He cant stop sneezing. His good friend Elephant makes him a hot cup of tea.
Dino and his friend go in search of the two missing eggs. On their quest they search the market and search the swamp.
The Lollipops Song Series

Henry wants to drink warm milk but Chef George is out of it. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find milk. There isnt any at the grocery store or on Jacks truck, but there is milk on the dairy farm, where cows produce it! Come along, grab a jug and enjoy fresh milk with Henry!
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A shower head? Of course not! Its toilet paper!

Pix is watering the beautiful flowers to bloom. But when Pix is out of the water, Leo comes to the rescue and fills more from the stream. Oh no! Theres a hole in the watering can! How will they water the flowers now?
Do you like to draw? So do Kim and Kit! When you cant draw like a robot - use your imagination!
Walter and Dude the Dog are looking for an item you can play with that is round and bounces. Is it an orange, a trolley of blocks, or a spring? Join the two friends as they discover its a ball!

What will Oliver discover at the birthday party? Join Oliver as he has fun blowing up balloons and find out whats inside the birthday present! A toy monkey, of course! Enjoy decorating the tasty cake with whipped cream, sweets and cherries! Happy Birthday!
Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?

The four friends on the island are unpleasantly surprised when two octopuses begin littering the island. Just when it seems they cant reconcile their differences, they come up with a creative solution

Henry wants to eat tasty strawberry pie but Chef George is out of strawberries. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find strawberries. There arent any at the grocery store or in the market, but there are strawberries in the field, where they grow! Come along and enjoy strawberry pie with Henry!

Its afternoon! Join the fun and play in the playground! Watch the robin and lark as they clean their lovely nest! Dream on the grass and have a fine rest! Come along, feel free to be happy - you and me! Swing along and sing a nice song!
On your marks, get set, go! Harley and Perry are off on a race in their rubber duck boats. Harley is out to win and isnt playing fair. Come find out we win the race!

Princess Number Two comes to Charlies rescue after he falls from his bike. They encounter various two objects such as castles, trees, birds and dragons on their way to the Numbers Party, where they have fun singing and dancing with numbers.
The Tiny Bunch gang are happy, and they know it! Baby, Elephant, Rabbit, Giraffe, Hippo and Turtle all join in to sing and dance If Youre Happy and You Know It! Come join them!
Lets play the Matching Game with Teeny and Tiny! Can you help solve this riddle and tell which item doesnt match?
A mouse in the field found a grain in the grass - he was so happy he started to dance - come on and jump, stomp your feet and wiggle your tail along with the mouse!

Can you hear that sound? Join Mr. Snail as he meets a friendly cricket at night! Discover how cricket makes that sound by rubbing his wings against each other! Come along and meet the night animals choir! Listen to cricket, owl and frog as they sing along in perfect harmony!

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.
Billy and Bam play with a balloon. When the balloon flies off the siblings run after it. Will they be able to get their balloon back?

Laz, Hop and Butterson find a creative way to make a waterslide in the back yard. The fun ends when the tap is stuck and the waterflow stops. The buggy friends manage to turn it back on with a shoelace! Let the fun continue!
One, two, buckle my shoe; Three, four, shut the door… Counting is the best! Lets join Charlie and the Numbers in this popular and cheerful song and count from one to ten.

A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeinas doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the objects true use is revealed to them.
Billy and BamBam enjoy playing with their race horses galloping over grass, a mountain and sand. Join them as they use building blocks and sticks to create a game of limbo! So how low can you go?
Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.
The friends paint on a sidewalk as the things they paint become real like a fence, steps to climb a mountain and more.
Dino and the Egg Hunt

Charlie and Yellow Triangle try to solve a mystery! They find a picture in an old chest of a house by a lake. When they get to the lake, they cant find the house. Together with Grey Rectangle and Orange Triangle they manage to solve the mystery!
Yum Yum loves spending lots of time alone at his new tomato patch, so his friends go away. Join Yum Yum as he brings them back and enjoys a nice tomato-themed dinner with them!
Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!
Johnny is in desperate need for a new bicycle seat. After a few funny attempts, Mikey finally finds just the right one.
Yay! Its a sunny day at the beach for Pix and Leo. Oh, but who is sneaking behind the tree and squirting water on them? Hmmm... Who could it be?
Dolly has a lemonade stand. But shes run out of lemons! What is she going to do? Luckily for her, Olly is a farmer today and hes on his was to the lemon grove with his tractor.
Black Sheep has really got her friends covered! She knits sweaters for Rabbit, Giraffe and Baby and to keep them extra warm she also makes them a scarf and hat!
Voom Vam tries to jump over a hole in the road but falls in! Roady and Trucky join forces to help get her out.

Come along and have lots of fun with egg cartons! Hop on the carton choo choo train with pasta wheels! Travel through magical carton mountains and noodle trees! See the chick in the spaghetti nest! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates cute carton rabbits!
Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends - Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!
Kim teaches Kit how to fly a kite. Kit helps Kim by making a really strong wind. Maybe a little too strong...
Old King Cole was a merry old soul, and a merry old soul was he. Join Old King Cole and his three fiddlers in this merry folk nursery rhyme.

Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Holland. Red flowers grow everywhere and the people love them! Watch what happens when white flowers suddenly grow in Yohannes garden! What a fun surprise!
Charlie plays hide and seek with his friend the chick. Is he in the box? Under the table? Maybe in the layundry basket? Come help him look!
A dolphin who dives under the sea meets a friend and they play and dance! After a while, a baby dolphin is born, slowly grows, swims, finds a dolphin friend, and has a new baby too!
Baby, Giraffe and Sheep have fun dancing in the rain with their umbrellas as Hippo tires to find some peace and quiet but keeps bumping his head.
Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! Whats inside the package? A coffee machine to make fresh and tasty coffee!
Baloo just loves his pointer stick when hes teaching, thats why he and the wolfpack go on a wild goose chase to get it back from the bird who took it. But who needs it more? Come find out!

Anybody hungry? Join Mick as he visits the vegetable garden, waters the plant with a watering can and picks some tomatoes, lettuce and carrots for a nice healthy salad he prepares and enjoys with his friends. Bon Appetit!
Come and befriend our loveable Draco and help him in his time of need. Help Draco find his ball and make a best friend for life.
Come join the fun as Bambam mischievously tries to frighten Billy as she peacefully eats her curds and whey

Yaya enjoys driving his little car and stops to let the ants cross the road. Maya is by her fruit stall but wants to ride the car as well. Join Maya and Yaya as they take turns driving the car safely and enjoy eating delicious and healthy fruit together!
Billy and Bam play with a balloon. When the balloon flies off the siblings run after it. Will they be able to get their balloon back?

Join Draco as he learns opposites - far away and close, as he tries to position himself in the best place to throw the basketball through the hoop. See how he steps back and forth and ultimately manages to score by getting the ball through the hoop!
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!
Its time to relax, slow down and unwind with Kiku. Calming visuals and soft music are great ways to prepare for bed.
Black Sheep has really got her friends covered! She knits sweaters for Rabbit, Giraffe and Baby and to keep them extra warm she also makes them a scarf and hat!

Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Come along and see the colourful cylinders, wheels and cubes as they connect to create a terrific train! Hop on board and join the friends on the amazing train ride! Choo Choo!
Mother Duck goes out with her five little ducklings. Each one is fascinated by something along the way. Luckily, they all find their way back in the end.
Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.
Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?
The Orient has never looked so colorful! Lale and Lolu explore the beautiful surroundings.
Join the musicians as they play beautiful sounds of Violin Sonata by Corelli. Step into the lively world of music as you enjoy the snow and penguins.
Put on your leg warmers and join the fun as Squirrel, Elephant, Hippo, Sheep and Rabbit shape up while touching their head, shoulders, knees, and toes!
Elephant, Giraffe and Rabbit sure know some moves. Join them as they count and dance!

Froggy and Ellie have fun in the bathtub blowing a flower and fish out of soap bubbles! Ducky wants to join them but how will he get there? Will he fly a bubble plane or hot air balloon? Come and see the bubbles as they connect to help Ducky join the friends!
Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things dont go quite as expected but thats part of the fun.

After a fun filled day of playing outdoors its always nice to snuggle up in bed with a comfy blanket and pillow. Join your favorite BabyTV characters - Hippo, Giraffe, Rabbit, Squirrel, Butterfly and more as they get ready for bed with this soothing evening song.

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his fun day with grandpa at the beach! Listen to Teddys story about grandpas tower of bears! See Teddy as he climbs the tower, catches a fluffy cloud and flies a beautiful kite high up in the sky!

Maya and Yaya take a long walk and meet a mischievous hedgehog on the way. Maya and Yaya feed him and try to interest the little animal in playing games such as jump rope and ball, but the hedgehog isnt interested. Join the two cute elephants to see what the nice hedgehog really wants! Sleep Tight!

Join Draco as he learns opposites thin and thick while trying to send Auntie Dragoona pictures by post for her birthday. The envelope he puts in the postbox slot is too thick so he places the pictures into separate thin envelopes. Happy birthday!
Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!
Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!
Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends - Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!
Its Needles first time ice skating. Skating is not easy as it looks. Needles tries again and again but he keeps falling and falling. Will he be able to come to the rescue when hes needed?

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Glue towers to make legs, add a blue box as a head and connect the parts to create a cool robot! Come along and enjoy the robot as he dances, plays with hoops and even flies!
In this fun and popular counting rhyme for kids, the five little hungry mice are climbing a pot of rice to have a yummy feast.
Daddy Hippo peacefully puts baby Hippo to Bed with this relaxing tune that is sure to get everyone sleepy.
Lale and Lolu climb tall pyramids and play ancient ball games in the jungle.

Join the wonderful musicians as they play pleasant sounds of Badinerie by Bach. Step into the lively world of music as you have fun in the colourful toy room playing with a teddy bear, toy blocks and dancing toy animals!
Squirrel is sleeping soundly when the fairy Ki takes him on a magical journey in the sky. Join them as they float through the stars and the moon.
All My Friends is a fun and cheerful childrens rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his adventures building a sand castle with grandpa at the beach! Join Prince Teddy as he has lots of fun inside the castle with Princess Teddy girl and grandpa! Open the castle gate, enjoy the royal meal with fruit and sweets and ride the royal horses!

Froggy is blowing soap bubbles in the bathtub! Whos spraying water on him? Ellie is playing ball and Ducky is sleeping on a mattress! Who could it be? Come along and find out! Join the fun and have a great time splashing and laughing in the tub with all the friends and cloud too!
Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep and Baby wash, iron and mend their clothes, sweep and scrub the floor and bake bread. And then they all go round the mulberry bush on a cold and frosty morning!

Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! See the parts and magical butterfly as they connect together to create a castle! Come along and play with Princess Joy, Prince Dylan and the friends in the fascinating castle!
Soothing music along with images from our surroundings is sure to put your little ones to sleep.
Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!
Lale and Lolu find themselves in the magical Viking world. As they sail on their Viking ships they discover the water has disappeared. Will they be able to continue sailing?
The Tiny Bunch gang are happy, and they know it! Baby, Elephant, Rabbit, Giraffe, Hippo and Turtle all join in to sing and dance If Youre Happy and You Know It! Come join them!
Join the musicians as they play beautiful sounds of the Flute Quartet by Mozart. Step into the lively world of music as you enjoy walking by the river at the park.
Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things dont go quite as expected but thats part of the fun.
Whats more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters - Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!

Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about Grannys exciting birthday trip! Join Teddy as he takes Granny on a train to visit the seaside and play in the soft sand! Visit the flowery hills and enjoy sweet honey from the bees! See the cool snow that Teddy brings from the mountain top! Happy Birthday Granny!

Ellie and Ducky are having fun playing with paint! Ellie wants to sleep but is covered with paint splashes! What shall he do? Join Ellie and Ducky as they clean themselves in the bath. Oh no! Ellie still cant sleep, but once Ducky returns, Ellie can finally fall asleep! Good Night!
Elephant and Baby Butterfly go on an expedition under the sea in a yellow submarine. In the sea they see a frog on a log, Squirrel watering a flowerbed, a shipwrecked pirate ship and more!
Old King Cole was a merry old soul, and a merry old soul was he. Join Old King Cole and his three fiddlers in this merry folk nursery rhyme.
One, two, buckle my shoe; Three, four, shut the door… Counting is the best! Lets join Charlie and the Numbers in this popular and cheerful song and count from one to ten.

Little Cabin in the Woods is a popular and fun song that teaches toddlers and young children colors and shapes with yummy fruits. Join Baby TVs friends as they have fun learning and eating a strawberry, a banana, a plum, and an apple together.
London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out - Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.
Little Lola and Charlie have fun with the animals on the farm. Join them in this classic rendition of Old McDonald. Dont forget to moo moo and oink oink!
The ants march along carrying cherries, oranges and other goodies from the picnic basket and find shelter from the rain.
Close your eyes, sit back, and relax. Its time to go to bed.
Say good night to the day and recharge yourself with a good nights sleep.
Time to take it slow and relax.
Time to take it slow and relax.
Time to unwind from the days activities and get ready for bed.
A relaxing journey with BabyTVs loveable charcters.
Lola has fun with all your favorite characters from the Tiny Bunch. Come join them as they sing the favorite classic This Old Man.
Baby, Giraffe and Sheep have fun dancing in the rain with their umbrellas as Hippo tires to find some peace and quiet but keeps bumping his head.
Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Oceans coral reefs.

Dokumentarni program u produkciji Euronews cele noći donosi priče iz sveta.

Vodimo vas na putovanje u Irsku, na rutu zvanu Divlji atlantski put. Ova ruta duga je 2500 km, upoznajemo vas sa predivnim pejzažima, kulturom i ljudima ove zemlje. Putovanje započinjemo u Dablinu, glavnom gradu Irske.
Saznajte prvi informacije u vestima iz sata u sat.
Euronews jutro, svakog dana od 8.00 do 11.00. Kroz tri sata programa sa aktuelnim temama i gostima vodiće vas novinari Euronews-a.

Naučnici u Rusiji otvorili su novu eru u lečenju onkoloških bolesti - Rusko Ministarstvo zdravlja pre par dana odobrilo je primenu personalizovane mRNK vakcine protiv raka, a među prvima koji će primiti ovu inovativnu terapiju je i pacijent iz Srbije oboleo od malignog melanoma. Kako je pacijent iz Srbije uspeo da se nađe na listi za primanje eksperimentalne terapije u Rusiji, kako izgleda proces lečenja i ko su najbolji kandidati, o tome za Euronews govori profesor doktor Sergej Boljević, šef Katedre za patološku fiziologiju na Sečenovskom univerzitetu u Moskvi.
Saznajte prvi informacije u vestima iz sata u sat.
Ekonomija, finansije, berze, preduzetnici. Šta se događa na tržištu i koliko vredi vaš novac - saznajte u Poslovnim vestima koje za Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana priprema Bloomberg Adria.

Biodiverzitet okeana je u opasnom opadanju. Prema podacima Uneska, ako se ništa bitnije ne promeni, više od polovine svetskih morskih vrsta naći će se na ivici izumiranja do kraja ovog veka. Na Kritu, morski biolozi posmatraju drastične promene koje će se verovatno proširiti širom Mediterana.

programmes.t: Kult: Muzej osamdesetih - emotivno putovanje u prošlost
programmes.d: Milje na televizoru, novac iz bivše Jugoslavije i neuništivi Tomos motor samo su neki od eksponata u Muzeju osamdesetih u Sarajevu. Ovaj muzej vraća nas u vreme i govori o ljudima i navikama jednog društva. Vodimo vas na putovanje u prošlost, koju i dalje pamte mnoge generacije.

Hiljade mladih Evropljana biva eksploatisano za vreme prvih godina na radu. Evropska Komisija priprema direktivu ne bi li ih zaštitila od zloupotreba na radnom mestu. Međutim, evropske zemlje još uvek ne mogu da se dogovore o predlozima. U ovom izdanju naše emisije pokušavamo da saznamo zbog čega je ovaj proces u ćorsokaku.

Gošća emisije Samo kultura je Nevena Jovičić, mlada spisateljica koja nastoji da današnjoj deci približi selo i život na selu. Njena knjiga Jedan dan na seoskom imanju dobila je posebnu nagradu Dositejevo pero koju dodeljuju učenici beogradskih osnovnih škola. Šta to ima na selu što vole deca u gradu, otkriće nam u ovom razgovoru.

Emisija Kustos vodi vas u obilazak najinteresantnijih muzeja u Srbiji. Otkrićemo gde se čuvaju kosti mamuta, a gde se nalazi kolekcija starih traktora. Upoznajte vredna svedočanstva istorije od severa do juga Srbije.
Druge priče su zanimljivi događaji, pojave i ljudi koji se retko viđaju u vestima. Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana donosi novi izbor priča od dopisnika iz svih krajeva sveta.
Upoznajemo vas sa likom i delom vajara Marka Crnobrnje. Posetili smo atelje u kome umetnik stvara drvene skulpture snažnih poruka, koje sve više pronalaze svoje mesto u javnom prostoru.

programmes.t: Scene: Od otpada do čistog izvora energije
programmes.d: Videli smo priliku da zaradimo, da obezbedimo sebi zaposlenje i da u isto vreme rešavamo problem, kaže osnivačica organizacije Eco-Erudites Uganda. Pogledajte kako se organski otpad pretvara u ekološke proizvode: biogas, organska đubriva i stočnu hranu.
Druge priče su zanimljivi događaji, pojave i ljudi koji se retko viđaju u vestima. Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana donosi novi izbor priča od dopisnika iz svih krajeva sveta.

U La Rinkonadi blizu Sevilje, novi trening centar obučava novu generaciju stručnjaka u vazduhoplovstvu. Samo godinu dana nakon otvaranja, centar Havijer Imbroda već je obučio stotine mladih ljudi za karijere u vazduhoplovnoj industriji. Uz direktan pristup vazduhoplovnim mašinama, modelima i praktičnim alatima, studenti iz svih sfera života mogu da direktno iz učionica prelaze u fabričke pogone.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Velike slike na malom formatu - minijature Bratislava Anđelkovića
programmes.d: Bratislav Anđelković iz Vučja kod Leskovca umesto na platnu i svoja dela oslikava na kamenu, zrnu pšenice, opanku, čak i na mravu. Kako nastaju minijature bez optičkih pomagala otkrivamo u ovoj emisiji.
Saznajte prvi informacije u vestima iz sata u sat.

E-misija je serijal posvećen inovacijama, održivim rešenjima i promenama koje oblikuju savremeni svet. Kroz aktuelne teme i inspirativne priče, emisija istražuje tehnologije koje menjaju našu svakodnevicu - od pametne poljoprivrede i zelenog transporta, do energije budućnosti i malih navika koje menjaju naše okruženje. U fokusu su ideje i inicijative koje povezuju nauku, ekologiju i društvenu odgovornost, sa ciljem da inspirišu pozitivne promene u zajednici.
Ekonomija, finansije, berze, preduzetnici. Šta se događa na tržištu i koliko vredi vaš novac - saznajte u Poslovnim vestima koje za Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana priprema Bloomberg Adria.

programmes.t: Kult: Portreti od konca - spoj ručnog rada u tehnologije
programmes.d: Donosimo vam priču o nesvakidašnjoj veštini izrade portreta od konca. U svojoj kući u Užicu, Ivica Vasiljević nekoliko dana izrađuje svaki portret, neprekinutim povlačenjem konca. Od mnoštva pravih linija, nastaje lice čoveka, prepoznatljive crte, sjaj u očima i na usnama. Počelo je kao zanimljiv hobi koji je slučajno otkrio na internetu, a danas je porodični posao.

Najbolji evropski stručnjaci za bezbednost hrane udružili su se da bi stali na put prevarama. Euronews ih prati u ovom specijalnom serijalu pod nazivom Detektivi hrane. U ovoj epizodi - nova tehnologija koja omogućava otkrivanje falsifikata među mlečnim proizvodima.

Emisija o aktuelnim temama iz svakodnevnog života sa gostima iz različitih oblasti i uključenjima reportera sa najvažnijih događaja ali iz drugog ugla. Izveštaji o situaciji u saobraćaju, kao i najave kulturnih i drugih događaja. Priče o herojima naše svakodnevice i temama koje se tiču svakoga od nas.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Međugorje - centar verskog turizma
programmes.d: Međugorje je mesto mira, tihe molitve, čuda i umerenog života. Milioni dolaze u ovaj centar verskog turizma, a mnogima je upravo dolazak u Međugorje potpuno promenio život. Ovo je priča o tim, dobrim ljudima, životu u Međugorju i međugorskom fenomenu.

80 godina je prošlo od ukidanja monarhije u Jugoslaviji. Predstavnici dinastije Karađorđević od 2001. godine žive u Srbiji, ali imovinsko-pravni status porodice još uvek nije regulisan. Koju imovinu Karađorđevići traže da im se vrati, kakav je bio odnos državnih vlasti prema dinastiji od devedesetih do danas, koliko sredstava se izdvaja za održavanje Dvorskog kompleksa na Dedinju i kako je u Crnoj Gori rešen status nekadašnje vladarske porodice Petrović - Njegoš? Odgovore na ova pitanja saznajte u dokumentarnoj emisiji Karađorđevići: Status dinastije.
Saznajte prvi informacije u vestima iz sata u sat.

Film Sunđer Bob - Prokletstvo pirata od 1. januara je u bioskopima širom Srbije. Gosti emisije Samo kultura su glumci koji su sinhronizovali ovaj film Vladislava Vaca Đorđević i Dimitrije Stojanović, kao i reditelj sinhronizacije Đorđe Lukić Rahaja.

programmes.t: Priča o uspehu: 20 godina hora Viva Vox
programmes.d: Prvi akapela hor u Srbiji Viva Vox proslavio je 20. rođendan na sceni Sava centra u Beogradu. Ovo je bio njihov 4. nastup u Sava centru, a za 20 godina postojanja pevali su više od 250 puta širom Evope i sveta. Svoju priču o uspehu ispričaće nam članovi ovog hora.

Obilazimo Finsku i otkrivamo zbog čega su Ujedinjene nacije ovu zemlju proglasile najsrećnijom državom na svetu. Počinjemo od glavnog grada Helsinkija, istražujemo istoriju, kulturu, dizajn, a potom odlazimo u Porvo, živopsini grad na jugu Finske.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Srpska se truba iz Meksika čuje
programmes.d: Čemin Santilanes je muzičar iz Gvadalahare, koji je zbog ljubavi prema srpskoj trubi redovni posetilac Festivala u Guči.Kada je i kako ovaj muzičar zavoleo zvuk srpske trube, ko ga je u Guči dočekao i šta je dobio na poklon od svog kolege Dejana Petrovića, gledaćete u ovoj emisiji.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Violine Jana Nemčeka -instrumenti svetskog glasa
programmes.d: Violine Jana Nemčeka nastaju u maloj radionici u Kovačici, a koriste ih muzičari širom sveta. Kako nastaje ovaj gudački instrument, otkriva nam vojvođanski Stradivari.

U novootvorenoj zgradi Ložionice priređena je prva izložba simboličnog naziva Ložionica: u pogonu od 1925. Ova izložba prikazuje šta je Ložionica nekada bila i čemu je služila. Svi koji dođu na ovu izložbu mogu da vide i čemu je zgrada, izgrađena pre jednog veka, namenjena danas.

Evropska Unija želi da ojača svoju odbranu zbog ruske agresije u Ukrajini i sve glasnijih zahteva Amerike Evropskoj Uniji da izdvoji više novca za finansiranje NATO. Na papiru, EU je napravila svoju prvu industrijsku strategiju odbrane u njenoj istoriji, ali to će koštati stotine milijardi evra. U ovom izdanju naše emisije govorimo o izazovima na putu naoružavanja Evrope.

In corpore sano je edukativna emisija kolažnog tipa koja obrađuje zdravstvene teme kroz nekoliko profilisanih rubrika. Obrađuje najčešće zdravstvene probleme, simptome, dijagnostiku i načine lečenja, informiše o fizioterapeutstkim vežbama koje možemo primenjivati kod bola u telu. Emisija edukuje o lekovima iz prirode i blagodetima lekovitog bilja sa naših prostora, nudi savete nutricioniste, donosi najnovije vesti o primeni veštačke inteligencije u medicini i proverava informacije chatgpt o zdravstvenim nedoumicama. Voditelj emisije je dr Ognjen Vučurević.
Druge priče su zanimljivi događaji, pojave i ljudi koji se retko viđaju u vestima. Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana donosi novi izbor priča od dopisnika iz svih krajeva sveta.

Ring je politička emisija Euronewsa, gde se najžešće evropske debate susreću sa najhrabrijim glasovima. U svakoj epizodi, dva politička teškaša iz različitih delova EU suočavaju se kako bi izneli raznolika mišljenja i podstakli razgovore o najvažnijim pitanjima u poslovima EU i širem političkom životu Evrope.
U emisiji Van Kocke viralne teme sa društvenih mreža dobijaju novu dimenziju. Uz goste ih analiziramo iz svih uglova. Tamo gde prestaje skrol - počinje Van Kocke.
Od 14.00 časova, gledajte centralnu temu Euronews jutra.

programmes.t: Scene: Sirijska Arada: tradicija koja je gotovo nestala
programmes.d: Donosimo vam priču o tradicionalnom sirijskom ritualu Arada i umetničkoj trupi koja ga neguje. Žele da sačuvaju stare ramazanske proslave i atmosferu koja je pretila da nestane zbog rata i raseljavanja.

programmes.t: Neka proradi: Stručno obrazovanje u Danskoj
programmes.d: Samo sat vremena od Kopenhagena, jedan centar za stručno obrazovanje i obuku pretvara danske učenike u majstore svog zanata. Šta sve tamo mogu naučiti pokazaćemo u ovoj emisiji.

programmes.t: Kult: Portreti od konca - spoj ručnog rada u tehnologije
programmes.d: Donosimo vam priču o nesvakidašnjoj veštini izrade portreta od konca. U svojoj kući u Užicu, Ivica Vasiljević nekoliko dana izrađuje svaki portret, neprekinutim povlačenjem konca. Od mnoštva pravih linija, nastaje lice čoveka, prepoznatljive crte, sjaj u očima i na usnama. Počelo je kao zanimljiv hobi koji je slučajno otkrio na internetu, a danas je porodični posao.
U emisiji Van Kocke viralne teme sa društvenih mreža dobijaju novu dimenziju. Uz goste ih analiziramo iz svih uglova. Tamo gde prestaje skrol - počinje Van Kocke.
Saznajte prvi informacije u vestima iz sata u sat.

Film Sunđer Bob - Prokletstvo pirata od 1. januara je u bioskopima širom Srbije. Gosti emisije Samo kultura su glumci koji su sinhronizovali ovaj film Vladislava Vaca Đorđević i Dimitrije Stojanović, kao i reditelj sinhronizacije Đorđe Lukić Rahaja.

Dubinska analiza dogadjaja koji oblikuju ekonomiju Srbije,ali i država Adria regiona i sveta. Sagovornici Vesne Damjanić su opinion makers koji trasiraju puteve ekonomije i politike i za koje novinari Bloomberg Adrije uvek imaju pitanje više. Bavimo se temama koja zahtevaju argumentovane odgovore i širu perspektivu sa fokusom na tržisšte nekretnina.
Obilazimo Finsku, zemlju snega, irvasa, haskija i Deda Mraza. Iako smo Finsku posetili u leto, novogodišnja bajka u ovoj zemlji može se iskusiti tokom cele godine.

Dobro došli u zeleni mir i tišinu... Donosimo vam priču iz lepog beogradskog ateljea umetnice Natalije Miladinović. Ona nam otkriva tajne slika iz serije Smaragd, koje je predstavila na samostalnoj izložbi u Gornjem Milanovcu.
Ekonomija, finansije, berze, preduzetnici. Šta se događa na tržištu i koliko vredi vaš novac - saznajte u Poslovnim vestima koje za Euronews Srbija svakog radnog dana priprema Bloomberg Adria.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Violine Jana Nemčeka -instrumenti svetskog glasa
programmes.d: Violine Jana Nemčeka nastaju u maloj radionici u Kovačici, a koriste ih muzičari širom sveta. Kako nastaje ovaj gudački instrument, otkriva nam vojvođanski Stradivari.
I u novoj sezoni pitam umesto Vas.Otvaramo i analiziramo teme koje presudno utiču na živote svih nas. I to DIREKTNO. Gledajte DIREKTNO sa Minjom Miletić na Euronews Srbija.

programmes.t: Ukrcavanje za Finsku: Prestonica Deda Mraza
programmes.d: Obilazeći Finsku odlazimo u Rovanijemi, prestonicu Deda Mraza. U ovom selu Božić traje cele godine. Pokazaćemo kako se topi novogodišnji kalaj, a isprobaćemo vožnju haskijima i kajakom.

programmes.t: Nepoznata Evropa: Magličgrad - internacionalni čuvari tvrđave
programmes.d: Za tvrđavu Maglič ste verovatno čuli, a mi vam otkirvamo Magličgrad, zajednicu za koju se pročulo šiom sveta i u koju dolaze ljudi iz celog sveta. Magličgrad predstavlja domaćinstvo, kamp, farmu, volonterski centar i skrovište za ljude koji sebe nazivaju čuvarima tvrđave.
Vodimo vas na putovanje u Irsku, na rutu zvanu Divlji atlantski put. Ova ruta duga je 2500 km, upoznajemo vas sa predivnim pejzažima, kulturom i ljudima ove zemlje.
Dokumentarni program u produkciji Euronews cele noći donosi priče iz sveta.

U emisiji The Circuit Emily Chang, novinarka Bloomberga, razgovara sa najveæim imenima iz sveta tehnologije, biznisa, zabave i kulture. The Circuit je brza, dinamièna serija, koja omoguæava publici da se, iza kulisa, upoznaju sa najuticajnijim trendovima i liènostima koje stoje iza njih.
Francine Lacqua istražuje motive koji pokreću najuticajnije ljude na planeti, a sagovornike poziva da definišu uspeh i da otkriju u čemu traže inspiraciju za poslovne poduhvate.
Američki bisnismen David Rubenstein upoznaje gledaoce sa ključnim investicionim strategijama i otkriva taktike vodećih visokorangiranih investitora.

Bloomberg Primer je nova emisija iz serijala Bloomberg Originals -šta se krije iza tehnologija koje postepeno transformišu globalna tržišta. Od letećih automobila do uticaja geoinženjeringa na našu planetu, Bloomberg Primer istražuje najsavremenije tehnologije koje pokreću globalnu ekonomiju, koristeći podatke analitičara, međunarodnih stručnjaka, ali i primere iz realnog sveta.
Najaktuelniji intervjui sa sagovornicima iz regiona i sveta na teme koje menjaju svet i analize koje pomazu u donošenju odluka.

U emisiji AI IRL, Jackie Davalos i Nate Lanxon, novinari Blumberga, istražuju načine na koji se veštačka inteligencija infiltrira u realni život. U diskusiji se analiziraju inovacije i ulaganja u AI, njena upotreba u različitim industrijama i društvu, ali i etika AI.

Najaktuelniji intervjui sa sagovornicima iz regiona i sveta na teme koje menjaju svet i analize koje pomazu u donošenju odluka.
Kada lideri iz sveta biznisa govore za Bloomberg Adriu, njihove poruke imaju dalekosežan uticaj. Intervjui sa top 100 lidera u Adria regionu i šire.

Šta pokreće finansijska tržišta? Koja nit koja povezuje globalne berze? Uz Bloomberg Adria Connect nalazite odgovore na ta pitanja i ostajete korak ispred vesti! Asja Francisti kroz razgovore sa svetskim i domaćim ekspertima iz svih oblasti ekonomije i Bloomberg Adria analitiku i koristeci neiscrpan izvor informacija na Bloomberg Terminalu donosi dubinske analize događaja na svetskim tržištima.

Insight vam donosi izveštaje analitičkog tima Bloomberg Adrije. Globalno relevantne teme koje se zasnivaju na konkretnim podacima i analizama stavljenih u kontekst zemalja regiona i sveta. Prikazujemo vam trenutno stanje i outlook koji vas podržava u donošenju budućih odluka. Kroz Bloomberg Adria Insight, Jelisaveta Lazarević i Marko Perožić daju detaljan uvid u ono što pokreće određene kompanije, sektore ili čitave privrede.

Svet finansija i biznisa na jednom mestu - u emisiji Bloomberg Talk vam donosimo intervjue s globalnim igračima, čiji odgovori pokreću tržišta kapitala i utiču na poslovne strategije i odluke na svim meridijanima. Iz ugla Bloomberg novinara - presek dešavanja koja su obeležila nedelju za nama sa fokusom na koracima koji tek slede. Actors
Kada lideri iz sveta biznisa govore za Bloomberg Adriu, njihove poruke imaju dalekosežan uticaj. Intervjui sa top 100 lidera u Adria regionu i šire.

Tačno, kratko, brzo i efikasno - biznis vesti koje treba da znate kako biste započeli dan, ali i kako biste ga završili. Vest iz Adria regiona, ali i šire koje su početak analiza i komentara za sve emisije Bloomberg Adrije.

Kroz Bloomberg Adria Sedam, Marko Perožić i Jelisaveta Lazarević daju sveobuhvatni, nedeljni pregled tržišta i tema koje će vas podržati u efikasnom donošenju poslovnih odluka. Snaga BBA platforme ogleda se u sinergiji novinarstva i analitike. Pregled najvažnijih naslova nedelje, analiza onoga što pokreće ekonomske diskusije na mrežama, i dubinski intervjui sa sagovornicima iz regiona i sveta. Bloomberg Adria Sedam donosi vrednost više za biznis zajednicu u Adria regionu.

Smart donosi priče iz Adria regiona o inovacijama koje menjaju svet, inovatorima koji uvode nova pravila poslovanja i mogućnostima za investitore koje nisu uobičajene. Valentina Grubišic pronalazi ljude koji svojim primerima u Smartu informišu novu generaciju biznis zajednice, ali i šire o tehnologiji, biznisu, kulturi i umetnosti.

Tačno, kratko, brzo i efikasno - biznis vesti koje treba da znate kako biste započeli dan, ali i kako biste ga završili. Vest iz Adria regiona, ali i šire koje su početak analiza i komentara za sve emisije Bloomberg Adrije.

Prikazujemo vam trenutno stanje i outlook koji vas podržava u donošenju budućih odluka. Kroz Bloomberg Adria Insight, Jelisaveta Lazarević i Marko Perožić daju detaljan uvid u ono što pokreće određene kompanije, sektore ili čitave privrede.

Koji ekonomski ili politički događaj je obeležio dan? Koja je to vest uzburkala tržišta i zbog čega se menjaju projekcije ili prave nove strategije? Kako globalni događaji menjaju regionalne ekonomske tokove? Odgovore koji sazdrže novi ugao i dodatu vrednost saznajte svaki dan u emisiji Spotlight.

Tačno, kratko, brzo i efikasno - biznis vesti koje treba da znate kako biste započeli dan, ali i kako biste ga završili. Vest iz Adria regiona, ali i šire koje su početak analiza i komentara za sve emisije Bloomberg Adrije.

Businessweek svake nedelje donosi najzanimljivije priče iz prestižnog poslovnog magazina Bloomberg Businessweek, kao i Bloomberg Adria Businessweek. Ivan Vrdoljak kroz razgovore sa autorima saznaje detalje globalno važnih tema o ljudima, kompanijama i događajima koji oblikuju današnjicu.

Svet finansija i biznisa na jednom mestu - u emisiji Bloomberg Talk vam donosimo intervjue s globalnim igračima, čiji odgovori pokreću tržišta kapitala i utiču na poslovne strategije i odluke na svim meridijanima. Iz ugla Bloomberg novinara - presek dešavanja koja su obeležila nedelju za nama sa fokusom na koracima koji tek slede. Actors

Valentina Grubišic pronalazi ljude koji svojim primerima u Smartu informišu novu generaciju biznis zajednice, ali i šire o tehnologiji, biznisu, kulturi i umetnosti.

Šta je pokretalo globalna tržišta kapitala , koji su to glavni igrači i događaji koji su usmeravali trgovanje i opklade na marketima širom sveta? Kako političari kreiraju tokove novca i konačno- kako to utiče na naš region? Saznajte petkom i vikendom u emisiji Connect Wrap.

Valentina Grubišic pronalazi ljude koji svojim primerima u Smartu informišu novu generaciju biznis zajednice, ali i šire o tehnologiji, biznisu, kulturi i umetnosti.

Svet finansija i biznisa na jednom mestu - u emisiji Bloomberg Talk vam donosimo intervjue s globalnim igračima, čiji odgovori pokreću tržišta kapitala i utiču na poslovne strategije i odluke na svim meridijanima. Kroz Bloomberg Adria Sedam, Marko Perožić i Jelisaveta Lazarević daju sveobuhvatni, nedeljni pregled tržišta i tema koje će vas podržati u efikasnom donošenju poslovnih odluka. Novac i igra? Može li bolje? A šta se nalazi između redova sporta i biznisa - otkriva nova emisija Lets play Money. U novom formatu Bloomberg Adrije, istražujemo poslovnu stranu sporta, gde se emocije i finansije često isprepliću. Od super ugovora igrača, preko globalnih tržišta TV prava, pa sve do izazova s kojima se suočavaju sportske kuće u vremenu digitalnih promjena - sve ovo je zapravo velika biznis priča. Radnja ovog komičnog filma govori o međususjedskim odnosima i zabranjenoj ljubavi između bogate gradske djevojke i siromašnog momka sa sela. Događaji se odvijaju u jednom selu u kojem je sve bilo u redu, dok se u susjedstvo nisu doselile lijepe cure kakve su svi samo mogli sanjati.
Emisija Muzički poster donosi mnogo dobre muzike, kao i zanimljive priče naših vrhunskih izvođača.

Priča prati Danicu, mladu ženu čiji se svijet srušio u jednom danu. Ona nakon emotivnog kraha, u želji da pobjegne od realnosti, odlazi u zabačeno selo, u kuću svoje prabake. Ali život na selu je sasvim drugačiji od onoga što je djevojka iz grada zamišljala...
Aktuelne informacije i vijesti.

Sadržaj emitovanja programa BN MUSIC baziran je i koncipiran na ideji da svojim gledaocima obezbjedi performance najvećih imena domaće muzičke scene i izvođača iz čitave bivše EX Jugoslavije; izvođače koji su obilježili jednu epohu i ostavili neizbrisiv trag u istoriji muzike na ovim prostorima; ali naravno da ćemo pružiti šansu i mladim, neafirmisanim izvođačima čije vrijeme tek dolazi.
Urnebesna komedija Srećan put komšija je šesti dio filma Dobro jutro komšija. Priča prati dešavanja dobro uigrane ekipe i publici znanih likova Čede, Branke, Danice, Mileta i drugih.

Putopisni serijal koji se razlikuje od svih ostalih. Nevjerovatna energija Roberta Dacešina pomoći će vam da ostvarite svoje snove o putovanjima i prije nego se uputite u avanturu, saznate sve što vam je potrebno da se osjećate komforno. Na dobitku su i oni koji više vole putovanje iz fotelje i sigurni smo da će nakon što odgledaju emisiju mnogi od njih postati svjetski putnici.
Informacije iz zemlje, regiona i svijeta, tematsko obrađivanje događaja.
Novogodišnji zabavno-muzički program pratite uz naš kanal.
Informacije iz zemlje, regiona i svijeta, tematsko obrađivanje događaja.

Orhun je uspješan poslovni čovjek koji je odrastao u bogatoj porodici bez ljubavi zajedno sa svojom sestrom bliznakinjom Nihan, mlađom sestrom Nuršah i njihovom hladnom, udaljenom majkom Afife. Nihan je pre izvjesnog vremena otišla da volonterski radi kao doktor, ali odnedavno je nemoguće kontaktirati, a njena porodica je zabrinuta za nju. Orhun odlučuje da krene za svojom sestrom bliznakinjom i vrati je kući. Dok traži sestru, nailazi na Hiru, siromašnu djevojku koja živi kao zatvorenik u rukama trgovaca ljudima. Orhun se slomi jer je lokalna banda otrovala i ubila Nihan. Kada se ispostavi da je zapravo Hira ta koja je otrovala njegovu sestru, Orhun kuje plan osvete: odvešće Hiru kući sa sobom...
Kultna jugoslavenska serija Bolji život prati svakodnevicu članova porodice Popadić, dok se suočavaju s raznim izazovima i poteškoćama.
Donosimo vam pregled najvažnijih događaja koji značajno utiču na svet u kome živimo! Saznajte sve o važnim zbivanjima iz sveta politike, društva i kulture.

Serija prati život petočlane porodice - Nikole i Jelice, koji imaju troje dece, a sa kojima živi i njena majka. Sa kakvim se oni problemima svakodnevno suočavaju, šta je ono što njih muči, i mogu li se nedaće sagledati kao izazovi?
Emisija o životnom stilu. Opustite se uz našu emisiju i saznajte šta je novo u svetu mode, muzike, gastronomije, fotografije i drugih oblasti koje ulepšavaju našu svakodnevicu.
Svi smo mi, u nekom kolenu, potekli sa sela. Vreme korone nas je podsetilo koliko je selo zapravo važno i koliko može biti dragoceno. Svakome je od nas baš njegovo selo najmilije.

Emisija Veze obrađuje aktuelne informacije o izgradnji objekata saobraćajne infrastrukture i realizaciji strateških projekata u oblasti saobraćaja, iz oblasti telekomunikacija, avio, drumskog, rečnog i železničkog saobraćaja; zatim aktivnosti na povećanju bezbednosti svih učesnika u saobraćaju, kao i o dostignuća u oblasti domaće i svetske automobilske industrije.

Ova emisija je neka vrsta edukativno-zabavnog vodiča za roditelje i one koji će to tek da postanu. Roditeljarije će otvoriti mnoge zanimljive teme i uz mnoge korisne savete i predloge, nastojaće da budu vodič na putu srećnog detinjstva vaših mališana.
Kulinarski magazin u kom za vas kuvamo najukusnija jela! Pođite sa nama u gastronomsku avanturu i otkrijte kulinarske tajne najvećih majstora.

TV ordinacija je informativna emisija o zdravlju, putem koje možemo da saznamo mnogo korisnih činjenica o prevenciji i lečenju najčešćih bolesti. Pomoću stručnih sagovornika iz sveta medicine, ova emisija će nam pružiti mogućnost da uz prave informacije, na pravi način čuvamo i poboljšamo naše zdravlje.
Donosimo vam pregled najvažnijih događaja koji značajno utiču na svet u kome živimo! Saznajte sve o važnim zbivanjima iz sveta politike, društva i kulture.

Emisija kroz koju će svi građani imaju priliku da se aktivno uključe i daju svoj doprinos očuvanju zelenih površina i čistoće grada.

Emisija kao videopozivnica da posetite najlepše krajeve naše zemlje. Šta da vidite, gde da pronađete smeštaj, šta da nipošto ne propustite, koje specijalitete u kom kraju obavezno da probate, koja iskustva da doživite - sve to možete saznati u našoj emisiji. Uz to, donosimo vam priče o običajima, kulturi, tradiciji i duhu naroda ali i prirodne lepote različitih krajeva naše lepe Srbije.
Pratite magazin koji je posvećen ekološkim temama, održivom razvoju i zelenom načinu življenja.

Donosimo vam sve o pravljenju najboljih vina, uzgajanju vinograda, ali i razvoju vinogradarstva i vinskog turizma u Srbiji. U zavisnosti od godišnjeg doba, naše teme su raznolike, a tiču se sadnje, berbe, održavanja vinograda. Akcenat je na pravljenju vina na Balkanu, ali naša ekipa obišla je vinarije u većem delu Evrope.
Emisija donosi razgovore sa stručnjacima i njihove korisne savete za poboljšanje zdravlja i prevenciju bolesti.
Iz epizode u epizodu, voditelj će ugostiti po jednu osobu sa javne scene. Gosti dolaze iz različitih sfera i oblasti, a zajedničko im je to da će malo po malo, otkriti i ono što možda nisu hteli.
Kulinarski magazin u kom za vas kuvamo najukusnija jela! Pođite sa nama u gastronomsku avanturu i otkrijte kulinarske tajne najvećih majstora.

Ela i Slipi usavršavaju trostruki vadičep, ali u posetu će im doći Prija, Elina najbolja drugarica sa Zemlje. Prija će izvesti taj potez i sve će oduševiti. Ela će biti ljuta što i dalje ne može to da uradi.

Megi se pokvarila i Ela i drugari će krenuti u potragu za retkim metalom koji će je popraviti. Metal se može naći samo na asteroidima. Drugari će shvatiti da bi moglo da im pomogne nešto što je Megi rekla pre nego što se pokvarila!
Slipi želi da gleda pomračenje i napravio je specijalne naočare za sebe i drugare, ali Ela ima drugačiji plan. Insistiraće da gledaju supernovu dvojne zvezde, ali Slipi će otići tamo gde on želi.
Godine 3021, u svemirskoj stanici negde između Marsa i Jupitera u Mlečnom putu, osmogodišnja Ela Rajder kreće sa drugarima u uzbudljive avanture i otkrića.
Prija je došla sa Zemlje da bi završila školski rad o Marsu. Njoj nije poznata ta planeta i nervozna je zbog peščanih oluja. Ela, Slipi i Madu će je ubediti da poseti Mars.

Žabac i drugari, zasnovano na klasiku Keneta Grejema, Vetar u vrbaku, nova je animirana serija za decu od četiri do sedam godina, u kojoj se Krtku, Packu i Žapcu pridružuje Ježica, koja je mlada i puna života.

Žabac i drugari, zasnovano na klasiku Keneta Grejema, Vetar u vrbaku, nova je animirana serija za decu od četiri do sedam godina, u kojoj se Krtku, Packu i Žapcu pridružuje Ježica, koja je mlada i puna života.

Žabac je instalirao novi bezbednosni sistem da bi zaštitio Žapčev dvor od lasica, ali zbog arogancije i lošeg ponašanja prema Mišku, Žabac će ostati van Žapčevog dvora. Samo će veliko izvinjenje moći sve da ispravi.

Žabac pokazuje svoju novu ležaljku, ali odbija da dopusti drugima da u njoj dremnu. Lasice će zarobiti Žapca u ležaljci i imaće Žapčev dvor na raspolaganju. Mogu li žapčevi drugari pomoću ležaljke da vrate Žapčev dvor?

Žabac i drugari, zasnovano na klasiku Keneta Grejema, Vetar u vrbaku, nova je animirana serija za decu od četiri do sedam godina, u kojoj se Krtku, Packu i Žapcu pridružuje Ježica, koja je mlada i puna života.

Mister Bin obožava da se igra u lokalnoj igraonici - da skače po trampolinama, juri niz tobogane, i najviše od svega da uroni u bazen s lopticama. Ali ne voli da deli igraonicu s onom dosadnom decom. Tako da Bin odlučuje da napravi svoju ličnu igraonicu gde će moći da se igra na miru. Nažalost, Irma, Gospođa Viket i Bruzerovi takođe žele da se pridruže njegovo zabavi.

Mister Bin naručuje picu, ali kada stigne razočaran je njenom veličinom.Zato odlučuje da ispeče svoje jedinstvene pice u obliku Tedija. Pod imenom Bin Pica, njegove pice postaju veoma popularne i uskoro posao počinje da cveta. Zbog toga, njegovom rivalu Don Krustoniju propada posao, i odlučuje da Mister Binu da ponudu koju neće moći da odbije.

Mister Binu nije dozvoljeno da putuje avionom na odmor, obzirom da njegov pasoš nema fotografiju. Kada ne uspe da se slika na automatu, pokušava na brojne načine da se fotografiše, uključujući i upadanje na fotografije turistima. Nište od ovoga ne upali, ali nakon što je uhapšen, policija može da mu pomogne. Reci ptičica!

Mister Bin želi da impresionira Irmu i prijavljuje ih na plesno takmičenje u parku. Ali njegov tango je užasan, i njegova rumba je grozna, pa se prijavljuje na časove plesa u plesnoj školi. Nakon neuspešnog časa u plesnom studiju, i posete biblioteci kako bi naučio, Mister Bin je izgubio pojam o vremenu. Mora da se oduži namrštenoj Irmi, ali da li će je njegovi improvizovani pokušaju očarati?

Ela i Slipi usavršavaju trostruki vadičep, ali u posetu će im doći Prija, Elina najbolja drugarica sa Zemlje. Prija će izvesti taj potez i sve će oduševiti. Ela će biti ljuta što i dalje ne može to da uradi.

Godine 3021, u svemirskoj stanici negde između Marsa i Jupitera u Mlečnom putu, osmogodišnja Ela Rajder kreće sa drugarima u uzbudljive avanture i otkrića.
Prija je došla sa Zemlje da bi završila školski rad o Marsu. Njoj nije poznata ta planeta i nervozna je zbog peščanih oluja. Ela, Slipi i Madu će je ubediti da poseti Mars.
Neće biti ništa od umetnosti i rukotvorina, ako Dizel i Persi ne nauče da dele.

Leminzi kradu Grickov krem i izbacuju ga. Gricko završava u hramu, nalazi kristalnu lobanju koja daje moć da uneseš razdor u grupu. Koristi je da zavadi glodare i uzme krem. Uticaj lobanje nije dugotrajan. Leminzi se udružuju da pokažu medi!
Dok se vraćao u brvnaru sa bobicama, Gricko se sapleo i pao. Izveo je akrobatske figure, te su leminzi zadivljeni i ponašaju se kao da im je idol.
Gricko i leminzi gube teglu čokoladnog krema u lavirintskom Hramu. Odlučni da dođu do nje, suočavaju se u lavirintu, ali se na kraju izgube.
Stvari počinju volšebno da nestaju u brvnari. Gricko je ubeđen da su krivci leminzi, ali i leminzi su žrtve neobjašnjivih krađi.
Žaba je progutala dragulj koji joj daje moć da kontroliše um. Gircko koristi žabu da proguta muve u brvnari. Leminzi odlučuju da se dokopaju žabe.

programmes.t: Superthings Rivals of Kaboom, Kazoom Power
programmes.d: Pratite avanture Kaja i njegovih prijatelja koji su pozvani u Kabum Siti kako bi pomogli superherojima u borbi protiv ozloglašenog profesora K.-a i Mr. Kinga. Kako bi se mogli boriti, Kaj i ekipa će dobiti fantastične moći i tako će postati superheroji kojima su se uvek divili.

Kada su Tajka greškom odneli na deponiju, Spajk će morati da potraži pomoć Toma i Džerija kako bi povratio svog sina pre nego što ga Ejs i Roko pretvore u pravo štene sa deponije.
Mačak i miš rivali se vraćaju i nastavljaju sa svojim vratolomijama. Sledite Toma i Džerija dok istražuju nova mesta, uključujući veštičju kolibu i laboratoriju šašavog naučnika.

Dok je u supermarketu tražio omiljenu hranu, otet je Mister Binov najbolji drug Meda. Bin pronalazi zlikovce i otkriva da Meda nije njihov jedini zarobljenik. Mister Bin spasava stotinu plišanih medvedića nakon što su im uši provučene kroz industrijsku mašinu za šivenje.
